Our members and partners are at the centre of all that we do.

Metrodata Academy ikut mencerdaskan kehidupan bangsa!

Setelah 45 tahun berkarya, pada tahun 2020, Metrodata mendirikan Metrodata Academy sebagai program pembelajaran TI yang inovatif, kreatif, dan kolaboratif.

Metrodata Academy memiliki empat pilar utama yang menjadi pegangan kita dalam mengembangkan talenta digital Indonesia, empat pilar tersebut adalah:
1. Metrodata Training: Menyediakan lebih dari 350 modul sertifikasi dan training bagi para individu dan kelompok, baik professional maupun mahasiswa. Didukung oleh trainer berpengalaman dan partner sertifikasi bertaraf internasional seperti, Oracle, Microsoft, EC Council, Red Hat, CompTIA, dan banyak lainnya.

2. Metrodata IT Camp: Program pelatihan bagi para lulusan baru agar mereka mampu bersaing di dunia industri. Dilatih intensif oleh mentor terbaik, para lulusan baru dapat memilih minat mereka untuk bergabung di
a. Metrodata Coding Camp, atau
b. Metrodata IT Security Camp.

3. Metrodata Internship: Kami membuka pintu yang sangat lebar bagi talenta digital untuk meningkatkan kemampuan di bidang Teknologi Informasi dan mendapatkan pengalaman bekerja di salah satu perusahaan IT terbesar di Indonesia. Bersama Kementerian Pendidikan dan Kebudayaan Riset dan Teknologi Indonesia, Metrodata Academy telah aktif menjalankan program Magang Bersertifikat dan Studi Independen Bersertifikat dari tahun pertama program tersebut dijalankan.

4. Metrodata Mengajar: Program edukasi dan sharing pengalaman oleh tenaga ahli dari seluruh entity Metrodata yang ditujukan untuk kalangan Pelajar/Mahasiswa, Dosen , dan Komunitas IT di seluruh Indonesia. Bertujuan untuk melakukan pembaharuan dan dialog antar semua pelaku IT.

Kami percaya, semua orang berhak mendapatkan kesempatan belajar yang sama tanpa batasan apapun. Metrodata Academy siap mendampingi Anda belajar dan bertumbuh menjadi individu terbaik.

Name: Human AI
Description:
Human AI : Au Service des Institutions, des Entreprises et de l'Humanité

Human AI est un acteur clé de la transformation digitale mondiale, spécialisé dans le développement de solutions IA adaptées aux gouvernements, aux entreprises et aux institutions éducatives. Nous accompagnons nos partenaires à implémenter l'IA de manière intégrée, en offrant une approche 360 degrés qui couvre la formation, le développement d'infrastructures numériques et la création d'écosystèmes IA durables.

Notre mission : Utiliser l'IA pour le bien de l’humanité tout en soutenant le développement durable. Nous mettons l'IA au service des institutions et des entreprises pour accélérer leur croissance, moderniser leurs infrastructures et optimiser leurs processus internes.

Nos domaines d'action :

 - Formation : Nous autonomisons les talents locaux grâce à des programmes adaptés, en anticipant les besoins de demain, puisque 85 % des emplois de 2030 n'existent pas encore.
 - Écoles et centres spécialisés en IA : Nous créons des établissements dédiés à l'enseignement et la recherche en IA.
 - Human AI Space : Un espace de démonstration et d'innovation pour encourager la coopération et l'expérimentation de projets IA.
 - Initiatives innovantes : Human AI mène des projets à fort impact, comme au Togo avec un système de vérification biométrique pour la CNSS, économisant 120 millions d'euros. Nous soutenons également plus de 200 startups en les aidant à aligner leurs projets avec les Objectifs de Développement Durable (ODD).

Avec plus de 27 000 ambassadeurs, notre réseau international se développe rapidement pour promouvoir une IA responsable et éthique.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette révolution technologique pour bâtir un futur où l'IA sert l'humanité de manière responsable et durable.

Name: Sora AI
Description:
Sora AI is a cutting-edge video generation model developed by OpenAI, designed to transform written text into realistic and engaging video narratives.

Key Capabilities:

Text-to-Video Generation: Sora can generate videos up to a minute long based on detailed text prompts. It can create complex scenes with multiple characters, specific types of motion, and accurate details of both the subject and the background.

Visual Detail and Consistency: uses a diffusion technique, starting with a noisy video and gradually refining it over many steps. This process ensures that the generated videos maintain visual quality and consistency, even when characters or objects temporarily go out of view.

Multi-Shot Videos: Sora can create multiple shots within a single video, accurately persisting characters and visual style throughout the sequence.

Technical Architecture

Transformer Architecture: Similar to GPT models, Sora employs a transformer architecture, which enhances its scaling performance and ability to handle a wide range of visual data, including different durations, resolutions, and aspect ratios.

Patch Representation: Videos and images are represented as collections of smaller units of data called patches, akin to tokens in GPT models. This unified representation allows for training on diverse visual data.

Safety and Moderation

Limited Access to Real Person Videos: OpenAI has restricted the feature that generates videos using uploaded photos or footage of real people to a subset of users, pending further testing to fine-tune their approach to safety. This is due to concerns about potential misuse, such as deepfakes and misinformation.

Metadata and Moderation: Sora-generated videos include metadata following the C2PA technical standard to help platforms detect the origin of the videos. Additionally, the model has filters to detect and moderate content involving individuals under the age of 18, particularly for sexual, violent, or self-harm content.

Topics of interest encompass: - Integrating DevOps methodologies into database workflows - Continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) for databases - Version control and change management for database schemas - Collaboration strategies between development and operations teams - Tools and technologies facilitating Database DevOps - Case studies on successful Database DevOps implementations Whether you're a seasoned database administrator, a performance optimization expert, or a DevOps professional specializing in databases, your contribution can make SeaQL Saturday a valuable learning experience for all attendees. This is an excellent opportunity to share your knowledge, discuss challenges and solutions, and network with peers in the industry.

Name: NTECH Training Centre
Description:
NTECH Training Centre is an institution led by women. It was founded in 2021 to provide a safe space and maintain privacy of digital content especially for the ladies who are not culturally comfortable to have their digital devices repaired by male technicians.

Currently, our focus is within Mombasa’s community which esteems the value of decency and privacy highly, especially for women. For example, women are required to cover themselves when they step out of their homes by wearing a headscarf (hijab) and Abaya. However, these ladies own ICT equipment; laptops and/or smart phones which contain their personal data including documents that they would not share with the public and pictures of themselves dressed with no hijab or Abaya. When a lady’s laptop fails, they are forced to take it for repair, more often, to a male technician which in return leaves their privacy vulnerable. This therefore makes it culturally uncomfortable to have their devices repaired by male technicians.

Lack of well-trained female technicians in Mombasa, has shown a rising need to equip girls and women with technical skills in repair and maintenance of ICT asset. Having more female technicians contributes to a more circular approach to utilizing ICT assets in a sustainable way, rather than the current store away approach when these assets are damaged/require service.

NTECH recognizes that, due to cultural norms, women would feel more at ease and comfortable having their gadgets repaired by fellow women. 

As a result, having skilled female technicians will create job opportunities for women, as well as a sense of belonging for the girls, who have been trusted to uphold privacy of other women.

OBJECTIVES
To train and equip ladies with technical ICT skills
To safeguard the privacy of clients’ digital content
To create job opportunities

Description:
BoxyBSD is a small non-profit project that gives people free access to BSD based VPS systems.

The idea behind it is simple. Many people want to try FreeBSD, OpenBSD or NetBSD, but they either do not have the hardware for it or they do not want to spend money just to experiment. BoxyBSD fills exactly this gap. The project offers free virtual machines that are easy to get started with. It focuses on helping beginners, students and anyone who wants to explore the BSD world without any barriers. Everything is maintained by volunteers who believe that open source should be accessible to everyone.

BoxyBSD is not just hosting. It is meant to support learning, share knowledge and give people a place where they can work with BSD systems in a simple and friendly environment. In short, BoxyBSD exists to make BSD easier to explore and to give something back to the open source community.

Name: AG Digital Productions
Description:
HOW DO YOU UNLOCK GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES FOR YOUR AGENCY?

There are plenty of ways to grow your agency, but they all revolve around 2 key objectives - Increasing revenue or increasing margin.

If possible, the ideal situation is to increase both.

Increasing revenue can be achieved by growing your client base, capturing a larger share of your existing clients’ wallets, or charging more for your services.

Increasing your client base means increasing your production capacity.

Capturing a larger share of the wallet means adding services and therefore capability.

Increasing prices really means attracting clients who have larger budgets, but inevitably have higher expectations. All of which brings us back to our need to increase capacity and capability.

Unfortunately increasing capacity and capability means greater overheads and subsequently lower margins. It’s a vicious circle that all of us face when running a business that ultimately leaves us asking…. is there a better way?

If you have found yourself pondering that same question, then you have come to the right place.

That better way is AG digital Productions.

Name: United Nations C4ISR Academy for Peace Operations
Description:
Originally established as the UN Signals Academy in 2015, the training centre was renamed the UN C4ISR Academy for Peace Operations (UNCAP) in 2020. UNCAP is committed to enhancing the preparedness of military signals, police and civilian peacekeeping C4ISR personnel— deployed and/or set to deploy into UN peacekeeping missions—with the skills and knowledge they need to successfully function in a UN environment and to perform at the highest levels.
The idea for a signals training centre was proposed after identifying critical gaps in ICT capacity in the TCCs/PCCs and the need to build their capacity through targeted training. In response, UNCAP was approved as a viable project and launched several months later.
The Academy is located in Uganda at the Regional Service Centre-Entebbe. The programme is co-managed by the Department of Operational Support and the Operations Support Division of the Office of Information and Communications Technology at UN Headquarters in New York, United States of America.
The training centre represents a strong commitment by Member States to work as one, fostering operational consistency amid the diversity of national forces that come together under the UN flag to foster peace in the world.

UNCAP Objectives
Greater coordination and interoperability between troops from various nations, enhanced participation by women in peace operations, economies of scale for mission operations and strengthened C4ISR strategic partnerships
UNCAP training comprises hands-on experiences and in-classroom learning in the following areas:
ICT basics including Radio communications, Satellite communications, Networking, Cyber Security and Spectrum Management, Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance (ISR) technologies, in particular micro Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS), Camp security and Early Warning technologies including terrestrial radars, Sense & Warn systems.

NumeriGirls est une journée dédiée aux collégiennes et lycéennes, de tout le département des Pyrénées-Orientales, pour leur faire découvrir les formations et métiers du numérique, encourager la mixité et lutter contre les stéréotypes.

C'est un événement de promotion pour un numérique plus féminin. A destination des filles de la 4ème à la terminale mais aussi aux élèves, filles ou garçons s’inscrivant dans un parcours numérique. Cette journée a pour but de déconstruire les stéréotypes de genre : “Non le numérique ne se limite pas à un geek enfermé dans le noir à faire des lignes de codes derrière son clavier avec un sweat à capuche”. Pour cela de nombreux intervenants organisent des ateliers pratiques (jeux, quizz, initiation, découvertes pratiques…) à destinations de groupes de 10 à 12 jeunes volontaires des Pyrénées-Orientales. Ces ateliers peuvent durer soit 45 min soit 1h40. L'événement propose également des conférences de 1h40 sur les enjeux du numérique de demain. Chaque jeune complète un questionnaire et se voit confier à son arrivée au lycée un parcours personnalisé pour avoir une vraie journée numérique sur-mesure.

Name: DORS/CLUC
Description:
DORS/CLUC – Dani otvorenih računarskih sustava / Croatian Linux Users’ Conference – is the oldest and biggest regional conference that covers free and open source software, open standards, and the Linux operating system. For the last 28 years, DORS/CLUC has brought together many prominent individuals and companies from the free and open source software community. 

The conference is coordinated by HrOpen and HULK, two non-profit organizations that tirelessly work to promote open technologies and encourage their application in everyday life. 

During two days of talks, workshops, and fun, DORS/CLUC becomes a place where students, FOSS enthusiasts, tinkerers, developers, hackers, freelancers, companies and the public sector representatives meet to learn, network, do business and plan projects together – all with focus on free software and Linux.

Keynotes and talks generally cover business topics, the latest experiences with FLOSS implementation and migration, and presentations of new tools and technologies, along with explanations on how to use them. 

Workshops are mostly tech-oriented, and provide the attendees with an opportunity to learn how to use a particular technology, as well as how to troubleshoot and solve problems with free and open source software and hardware. 

There is something for everyone at DORS/CLUC. Whether you are a beginner or an experienced member of the FOSS community, we believe that two days full of interesting talks, networking, and knowledge exchange will count as time well-spent.

Name: VARSAT
Description:
VARSAT est une solution d’entrainement virtuel de dernière génération (jusqu’à 10 utilisateurs simultanés sur 500m2 avec eye tracking et hand 
tracking). Elle est augmentée par des accessoires haptiques et des capteurs biométriques (stress et effort) qui permettent un apprentissage mental et physique. Le coeur de la solution est formateur centré. 
Nous privilégions le pouvoir donné au formateur pour construire en autonomie les scénarios, interagir avec les équipes durant et après 
l’entraînement. VARSAT est pensé pour l’entrainement des équipes en situation de risque et intègre les facteurs clés d’une simulation professionnelle (balistique, dynamique du feu, hydraulique, …) ainsi que les procédures (communication, coordination) et les gestes métiers spécifiques au domaine. 
C’est une solution duale qui s’adresse aussi bien à la défense militaire ou civile qu’à l’industrie. VARSAT a été fondée par un écosystème d’entreprises françaises spécialistes dans la réalité virtuelle, l’électronique, la défense et l’industrie.

Name: EMA European Mainframe Academy
Description:
Since 2008, the EMA European Mainframe Academy GmbH has been promoting mainframe training using innovative methods. Their hybrid courses combine classroom and online learning in a blended learning system that allows participants to learn at their own pace without changing their working hours. With a focus on practical exercises and engaging content, EMA makes mainframe training effective and fun.

EMA bridges the gap between corporate and academic institutions, supported by the Academic Mainframe Consortium e.V. and the IBM Academic Initiative. Customers such as Datev, Commerzbank, Deutsche Bundesbank, Finanzinformatik, T-Systems and BMW rely on its expertise.

The curriculum covers classic mainframe topics as well as the latest technologies such as hybrid cloud environments and AI. Its blended learning concept combines training and day-to-day business and offers company-specific training. EMA's highly recognized training programs ensure that their certifications are valued by employers.

More insights on how  to train the next generation of mainframe professionals can be found at https://mainframe-academy.com  
An overview of all courses can be found on: https://mainframe-academy.de/ausbildungen/

Name: CAREST
Description:
W CAREST wierzymy, że każda opinia i każde zgłoszenie to szansa na doskonalenie – dlatego stworzyliśmy narzędzie, które pomaga firmom aktywnie wykorzystywać feedback klientów do optymalizacji procesów i podnoszenia jakości obsługi.

 CAREST to innowacyjna platforma stworzona przez @COMATI, która przekształca głos klienta w realne zmiany organizacyjne. Pomagamy firmom skutecznie zarządzać reklamacjami, analizować dane i wprowadzać udoskonalenia, które realnie wpływają na poziom satysfakcji klientów.

Dlaczego warto wdrożyć CAREST?
 Optymalizacja procesów – przekształcamy zgłoszenia klientów w konkretne KPI, które wspierają rozwój organizacji.
 Profesjonalne wdrożenie – zapewniamy kompleksowe wsparcie na każdym etapie, od planowania po szkolenia.
 Nowoczesna filozofia zarządzania zgłoszeniami i reklamacjami – zmieniamy podejście firm do obsługi klienta, sprawiając, że reklamacje stają się szansą na poprawę, a nie tylko „problemem do rozwiązania”.
 Przejrzystość i szybka reakcja – dzięki CAREST firmy mogą monitorować kluczowe wskaźniki jakościowe, usprawniając komunikację i podnosząc poziom obsługi.

Branże, w których CAREST robi różnicę
 Motoryzacja – dealerzy i serwisy mogą skutecznie zarządzać zgłoszeniami i usprawniać procesy obsługi posprzedażnej.
 Logistyka – eliminacja błędów, szybsza reakcja na problemy, poprawa efektywności.
 Usługi – budowanie lepszych relacji z klientami dzięki analizie opinii i wdrażaniu ulepszeń.

 Czy Twoja firma rzeczywiście słucha swoich klientów?  Jeśli nie, czas to zmienić!

 Dowiedz się więcej: www.carest.pl

Name: Digital Logistics Solutions
Description:
Digital Logistics Solutions empowers the logistics and freight forwarding industry with cutting-edge software designed to streamline operations, boost efficiency, and enhance supply chain visibility. Our comprehensive suite of products simplifies complex workflows, reduces costs, and enables real-time data-driven decisions. By embracing innovation and technology, we help businesses transform their logistics operations, stay competitive, and achieve long-term success in a fast-paced, evolving marketplace.

At the heart of Digital Logistics Solutions is Scope, a cloud-based solution tailored for freight forwarders. This comprehensive management system is a game-changer, handling all aspects of freight forwarding. Scope's integration of functionalities like quotation management, booking handling, documentation, and track & trace capabilities into a single platform ensures efficient handling of shipments from origin to destination, reducing errors and delays.

Additionally, Digital Logistics Solutions focuses on enhancing collaboration and communication within the logistics ecosystem. Their software solutions facilitates seamless interactions between stakeholders, including shippers, carriers, customs authorities, and end customers. This connectivity improves operational efficiency and enhances customer service by providing real-time updates and transparency throughout the shipping process.

In summary, Digital Logistics Solutions provides advanced, user-friendly software solutions and is pivotal in the logistics and freight forwarding industry. Their commitment to innovation, efficiency, compliance, and data-driven decision-making sets them apart as a trusted partner for companies looking to optimize their supply chain operations. Through their comprehensive suite of products like Scope, Digital Logistics Solutions continues to drive digital transformation within the logistics industry, helping businesses adapt and thrive in an increasingly competitive global market.

Une orientation opérationnelle L’ exposé des concepts et des techniques est confronté en permanence à leur application pratique. C’est pourquoi la partie d’ingénierie formation permet de donner à chaque stagiaire l’envie d’accroître ses compétences en élargissant son niveau de performance car les exemples choisis sont ceux de leur entreprise avec une réponse à leur problématique.

Une stratégie de qualité et d'innovation Créativité, innovation, écoute, réflexion, rigueur… Au cœur de la vision que nous nous faisons de notre métier, toutes ces valeurs sont réunies pour vous apporter le meilleur de ce qui existe actuellement.

Name: She Hacks Africa
Description:
The She Hacks Africa Coding Bootcamp is an initiative of WAAW Foundation involved in an intensive in-person and virtual training workshop, where African youths learn software programming, Mobile App development, and product design and then practice what they have learned in project-based exercises that aim to simulate the every-day work environment and build their self-confidence as community change-makers, technology innovators and entrepreneurs thereby setting them up for a deep dive into a comprehensive startup to build a functioning prototype or launch their idea by the end of the program.

She Hacks Africa coding Bootcamp offers 3-4 week curricula in software development, Mobile App design, product design, entrepreneurship, and leadership. The range of programming languages and platforms concentrates on full-stack web development and mobile app development including HTML5, CSS, Bootstrap, Javascript, React, React Hooks, MEAN Stack (Mongo DB, Express, Angular JS, Node JS), Vue, and flutter.

We also offer UI/UX and product design courses. We expose participants to various development platforms, code integration tools like GitHub, and software testing and debugging tools. Our participants learn agile development methodologies and other key elements including communication, documentation/record keeping, and morals/ethics needed to succeed in a technology position. The workshop learning experience is project-based with lectures, collaborative work, and real-world exercises making up the instructional framework.

Our curriculum also includes the development of projects, portfolio & CV, Ethics, Mentorship and coaching for interviews and salary negotiation, and Soft skills courses (communication and public speaking skills).

Name: موسوعة محامو البحرين
Description:
الموسوعة القانونية الإلكترونية للتشريعات والأحكام القضائية البحرينية
1- أول موسوعة قانونية إلكترونية في (مملكة البحرين) عملت على تحويل جميع ما نشرته الجريدة الرسمية -من تشريعات ولوائح وقرارات وأحكام قضائية للمحاكم العليا بمملكة البحرين- من صور إلى نصوص إلكترونية وقد تم إطلاقها في العام 2007م.
2- تبدأ التشريعات في الموسوعة منذ صدور العدد الأول للجريدة الرسمية حتى تاريخ اليوم وفقًا لتصنيف وفهرسة خاصة بالموسوعة.
3- تصنف الموسوعة المواقع الرسمية للجهات الحكومية كمصادر للتشريعات الفرعية، وتضيف كل جديد منها إلى الموسوعة.
4- أول موسوعة قانونية تنشر التشريعات وفقًا لستة تصنيفات، وهذا التصنيف مبتكر والشبكة أول من قام به، وذلك كما يلي:
• التشريعات السارية.
• التشريعات المُلغاة.
• التشريعات الموقوفة.
• التشريعات المؤجلة النفاذ.
• التشريعات التي تنشرها المواقع الحكومية ولم تُنشر بعد في الجريدة الرسمية.
• التشريعات التي صدرت ولم تنشر في الجريدة الرسمية أو في المواقع الحكومية.

5- أول موسوعة قانونية بحرينية تنشر "بطاقة تعريف للتشريع" تتضمن أهم البيانات التي يحتاج إليها الباحث بشكل سريع ومنها ما يلي:
(أداة الصدور- تاريخ النشر- تاريخ النفاذ).

6- أول من نشر القانون أو اللائحة وفقًا لآخر تعديل, وبذلك اختصرت على الباحث وقتًا هائلاً في التحقق مما إذا كان قد صدر تعديلات على النص، أو إلغاء مواد أو إصدار مواد مكررة على التشريع. مع إمكانية تتبع التعديلات الجديدة والرجوع إلى تواريخ التعديلات... إلخ.
7- أول من نشر الأحكام القضائية بعد تحويلها من نصوص ورقية إلى نصوص إلكترونية، وتنشر الموسوعة أحكام وقرارات المحاكم التالية:
• محكمة التمييز.
• المحكمة الدستورية.
8- أول من ربط المواد القانونية في التشريعات بما صدر حولها من أحكام قضائية، وأول من نشر نصوص المواد التي ترد في الأحكام القضائية لتسهيل الرجوع إليها.
9- ثراء الموسوعة باحتوائها على أكثر من 17000 من التشريعات الأساسية والعادية والفرعية (قوانين - لوائح تنفيذية - قرارات - تعاميم... إلخ), ويجرى تحديثها فورًا.
(الإحصائية حتى منتصف العام 2021).
10- تتيح (شبكة المحامين العرب) ترجمة التشريعات إلى اللغة الإنجليزية لمن يطلبها.
11- يتضمن موقع "محامو البحرين" ملفًّا صحفيًّا منذ إطلاق الموسوعة يتضمن أخبارًا صحفية ومقالات قانونية .

Name: Ismijnbedrijfveilig.nl
Description:
Terwijl de cyberdreigingen elk jaar toenemen, investeren grote ondernemingen massaal in hun beveiligingsinfrastructuur. Echter, het midden- en kleinbedrijf (MKB) blijft achter, wat resulteert in een toename van cyberaanvallen binnen deze sector. Schrikbarend genoeg bedraagt de gemiddelde schade van een hack bij MKB-bedrijven €300.000 – een bedrag dat voor velen leidt tot faillissement.

IsMijnBedrijfVeilig.nl is een initiatief gericht op het verhogen van de cyberveiligheidsbewustzijn onder Nederlandse ondernemers, specifiek zzp'ers en MKB-ondernemers. Ons platform biedt de mogelijkheid om de beveiliging van uw bedrijf kosteloos te laten evalueren, gebruikmakend van diverse gratis hulpmiddelen om uw bedrijf aanzienlijk veiliger te maken.

Bezoek IsMijnBedrijfVeilig.nl en bescherm uw bedrijf vandaag nog tegen cyberdreigingen.

#ismijnbedrijfveilig #cyberveilig

Name: tioCode
Description:
tioCode, des cours de code pour les enfants : nous enseignons aux enfants l'avenir!

 Robotique embarquée, 
 Création de jeux vidéos, 
 Programmations.

Nous avons deux écoles : à Nice et Sophia Antipolis.

Comment nous fonctionnons ?

Nos cours sont dispensés le mercredi où le samedi, s'inscrivant parfaitement dans le cadre d'une activité extra-scolaire.

Pour qui ?

Les enfants à partir de 7 ans.

Nos Cursus à l'année en détails :

IT Start (À partir de 7 ans) : 
Apprentissage de l'informatique de base de façon ludique.

 RoboGame MIX (À partir de 8 ans) : 
Un programme mix, modélisation 3D, robotique et création de jeu vidéo.

    RoboCode MIX (À partir de 11 ans) : 
Un programme mix complet de plusieurs modules, web, jeux vidéos, robotique.

 Développement Web junior (À partir de 14 ans) : 
Apprentissage de langage de programmation pour créer une application

 Unity Beginner (À partir de 12 ans) : 
Création de jeux vidéo sur Unity

 Développement de jeux vidéos (À partir de 9 ans)  : 
Création de jeux vidéo niveau débutant.

  Python Beginner (À partir de 10 ans) : 
Apprendre le langage Python dans l'univers de Minecraft

 Robotique Embarquée - ArduinoKidsPro (À partir de 8 ans) :  Apprendre la robotique

Nos stages :

Nous avons aussi des stages intensifs de 5 jours durant les vacances scolaires où nous abordons différents thèmes :

le code : Python (code combat),
la robotique : création d'un projet avec Ardublock,
la modélisation 3D : Tinkercad,
la création de jeux vidéo (Minecraft, Roblox et d'autres.)

Ensemble, construisons un avenir où la technologie inspire, connecte et transforme.

Name: CYBER VIGILANTS
Description:
Protéger. Éduquer. Sensibiliser.

Cyber Vigilants est une association engagée pour la sensibilisation aux risques numériques auprès des enfants, des parents, des enseignants et du grand public.

Face à la multiplication des menaces en ligne — harcèlement, usurpation d’identité, exposition précoce aux réseaux sociaux, addictions numériques, escroqueries — nous avons décidé d’agir.

Nous intervenons dans les écoles, les collèges, les associations de parents d’élèves, les entreprises et lors d’événements publics pour organiser des ateliers de prévention concrets, ludiques et percutants. Notre objectif : donner les bons réflexes et favoriser un usage sain et sécurisé des outils numériques.

Nos interventions abordent des sujets comme :
	•	Les dangers cachés des réseaux sociaux
	•	Le cyberharcèlement et le respect en ligne
	•	Les contrôles parentaux et la gestion du temps d’écran
	•	Les signes d’alerte à connaître
	•	L’identité numérique et la réputation en ligne
	•	L’intelligence artificielle et ses dérives (deepfakes, contenus manipulés…)

Cyber Vigilants, c’est une communauté de professionnels du numérique, de formateurs, de parents engagés qui souhaitent transmettre leur expertise et alerter sans culpabiliser.

Nous cherchons des partenaires, des établissements intéressés pour accueillir nos actions, et des membres souhaitant s’engager à nos côtés.

Ensemble, soyons vigilants.

Contactez-nous pour organiser un atelier ou pour nous rejoindre.

edubulut, Amazon Web Services (AWS) Advanced Partneri Sufle tarafından kurulmuş, bulut bilişim ve AWS alanında uzmanlaşmış bir eğitim platformudur.

AWS Training Partner olarak, AWS tarafından yetkilendirilmiş ve onaylanmış bir marka olan edubulut, kişilere en güncel ve en kapsamlı AWS eğitimlerini sunma ve onları AWS sertifikalarına hazırlama konusunda uzmandır.

Türkiye'de AWS Advanced Training Partner unvanına sahip az sayıdaki eğitim platformlarından biri olarak ön plana çıkan edubulut, AWS tarafından onaylı en güncel eğitim materyallerini kullanarak teorik ve lablar içeren eğitimler gerçekleştirmektedir.

edubulut'un misyonu, AWS'nin gücünden faydalanarak kariyerinizde ve kişisel gelişiminizde hızlı ve sürdürülebilir bir şekilde ilerlemenize yardımcı olmaktır.

Sertifikalarımız;

Temel Seviye
-AWS Cloud Practitioner
-AWS AI Practitioner

İleri Düzey
-SysOps Administrator Associate
-Developer Associate 
-Solutions Architect Associate 
-Data Engineer Associate 
-Machine Learning Engineer Associate 

Profesyonel Düzey

-DevOps Engineer Professional 

Uzmanlık Düzeyi
-Advanced Networking Specialty

Name: infosec SIMPLIFIED
Description:
Infosec Simplified – Making Cybersecurity Understandable and Achievable

At Infosec Simplified, we believe cybersecurity doesn’t have to be complicated. Our mission is to equip professionals and organizations with the skills, knowledge, and confidence to protect what matters most in today’s digital world.

We specialize in globally recognized certification training — including CISSP, CISA, CISM, and CRISC — delivered through practical, easy-to-understand, and exam-focused sessions. With a blend of real-world case studies, interactive learning, and personalized mentorship, we make complex security concepts simple, clear, and actionable.

Whether you’re an IT professional aiming for career growth, a business securing its digital assets, or a beginner entering the cybersecurity field, we provide the guidance and tools you need to succeed and stand out.

Our Edge
Expert-led training by certified industry professionals.
High pass rates through proven teaching methods and mock exams.
Flexible learning modes — live online or in-person.
Post-training career support to help you land your next opportunity.

Protect. Grow. Lead. — With Infosec Simplified, cybersecurity becomes second nature.

Name: ThinkCyber Bulgaria
Description:
ThinkCyber is a global cybersecurity training academy dedicated to empowering the next generation of cyber professionals with practical, real-world skills. Rooted in a foundation of in-depth research, hands-on simulations, and scenario-driven learning, our mission is to prepare individuals, teams, and organizations to meet the rapidly evolving challenges of cyber threats.

Founded as an expansion of ThinkCyber’s original vision, established in 2016 to deliver advanced cybersecurity training and services grounded in real-world application, ThinkCyber International builds upon proven methodologies developed through law enforcement, military, and industry experience.

Our training approach integrates immersive labs, proprietary simulation technologies, and practical exercises designed to mirror real attack scenarios. Through platforms such as the CYBERIUM simulator powered by Specto, learners gain hands-on experience defending against current and emerging threats, fostering operational readiness from foundational concepts to advanced defensive and offensive skill sets.

As an internationally oriented organization, ThinkCyber International adapts and delivers ThinkCyber’s cybersecurity programs to a global audience, expanding access to high-impact training content and supporting professionals at every level, from beginners to seasoned experts. Our goal is to strengthen cyber resilience worldwide by equipping learners with the capabilities needed to protect critical systems, infrastructure, and data in an increasingly digital world.

Name: eConvolution GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei eConvolution GmbH - Ihren Experten für IT-Consulting und IT-/ PE-Fortbildung! 

Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2002 sind wir in der IT-Branche präsent und können sogar auf eine Erfahrung seit 1990 zurückblicken. Mit Stolz können wir uns als "alte Hasen" bezeichnen, die sich auf die Bereiche IT-Consulting und IT-/ PE-Fortbildung spezialisiert haben. Bei uns können Sie sich sicher sein, dass wir stets auf dem neuesten Stand der Technologie sind.

Unser Produkt? Geballtes Wissen! Seit über 20 Jahren sind wir Experten im Bereich des Know-How-Transfers und der Projektunterstützung. Wir bieten Ihnen zertifizierte Kandidaten und Dozenten, exzellente Erfahrung in der Kursdurchführung und vor allem die Leidenschaft, Ihre Wünsche zu erfüllen.

Uns liegt das gesunde Beziehungsmanagement zwischen Beratern, Trainern und unseren Kunden in heterogenen Struktur-, IT- und Schulungsprojekten am Herzen. Wir verstehen, dass jedes Geschäft einzigartig ist, und deshalb setzen wir alles daran, Ihr Geschäft zu verstehen. Kein Wunder also, dass wir Partner vieler globaler Player sind.

Sie haben die Qual der Wahl! Bei uns stehen Ihnen 500 IT-Experten und 200 verschiedene Themen zur Verfügung. Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, um Ihre spezifischen Anforderungen zu erfüllen und Ihnen dabei zu helfen, Ihr volles Potenzial auszuschöpfen.

Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Ihre IT-Herausforderungen meistern!

Name: Data Lama
Description:
Data Lama est une entreprise québécoise fondée en 2022 qui poursuit la mission de soutenir les organisations publiques, privées et sans but lucratif dans la gestion éthique et responsable de leurs données. Les projets numériques et l’IA sont au cœur de notre expertise.

Nous vous accompagnons dans la mise en conformité vis-à-vis des lois, règlements, politiques et normes éthiques, en agissant sur le terrain et auprès des équipes en mode gestion de projets.

Nous travaillons à vos côtés pour produire des rapports et des études de tous genres en lien avec les données et l’IA : revues de littérature, stratégies, politiques, mémoires, etc.

Nous offrons des formations pour tous types de public (des plus experts aux plus débutants) concernant les données et l’IA : protection des données, usage responsable de l’IA générative…

Les valeurs qui nous guident en matière de données : 
- Démocratiser le numérique
- Soutenir la recherche et l’innovation
- Favoriser l’accès aux données
-Impulser la transparence et l’ouverture
- Mettre en oeuvre une gouvernance inclusive

Name: Code 247 Foundation (C2F)
Description:
Code 247 Foundation is a non-profit organization dedicated to promoting coding skills, blockchain (DLT), Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML) and Robotics among African youth, with a specific focus on Nigeria. The foundation comprises certified tech experts from different parts of African countries who are passionate about helping young people acquire the necessary coding ideas and skills needed to thrive in today's fast-paced technological landscape. One of the main goals of the Code 247 Foundation is to empower young people to become active participants in the growing digital economy. By training and providing them with resources on blockchain and Artificial Intelligence (AI), the foundation aims to equip young Africans with the skills needed to create innovative solutions to pressing challenges faced by their communities. With these skills, young people will be able to play a key role in driving economic growth and development across Africa.

Since our inception in 2020, we have taken significant strides towards achieving our mission of raising over 1 Million Smart Contract Developers by 2030. Our efforts have resulted in onboarding over 2000 youths into the blockchain space, providing them with technical skills and knowledge, and most recently, we awarded 200 youths a fully-funded scholarship to Althash University for a comprehensive 2-month certification program in blockchain technology.

Name: I-TECH LEARNING

With a comprehensive curriculum, expert instructors, and a commitment to helping you master the digital tools and technologies of the modern world, The IT Learning Hub empowers you to excel in your career, enhance your employability, and take a significant step towards becoming a digital expert.

In this comprehensive description, we will explore The IT Learning Hub, delving into its mission, courses, teaching methodologies, instructors, and the benefits of enrolling in this dynamic educational platform. From the basics to advanced levels, our goal is to provide you with a deep understanding of what The IT Learning Hub has to offer and how it can transform your IT skills and career prospects.

I. The IT Learning Hub: Mission and Vision

The IT Learning Hub was founded with a clear and ambitious mission: to empower individuals with the knowledge and skills needed to thrive in the ever-evolving field of information technology. We believe that technology has the power to transform lives and organizations, and that everyone should have the opportunity to harness its potential.

Our vision is to become a global leader in IT education, making quality training and expertise accessible to a diverse audience. Whether you're a professional looking to upskill, a student seeking to broaden your horizons, or an organization striving to equip your workforce with cutting-edge IT skills, The IT Learning Hub is your partner in this journey.

BUDGET SECURITY

HARDWARE SERVICING

This service is complimented by an Auto Call System that automatically reports hardware errors to the Support Guard Control Centre. In this way, a Support Guard service technician can be with you with the correct replacement parts before you have even noticed the fault.

YOUR SECURITY IS OUR BUSINESS
The Support Guard Software Service Contract allows SLAs to be chosen to fit individual requirements – for all companies, which rely on the maximum availability of their IT systems:
•	24 X 7 availability online, telephone and on-site service
•	Call back within 15 minutes

Name: SUSA - Sustainable Healthcare with Digital Health Data Competence
Description:
SUSA spearheads a comprehensive educational transformation within the European healthcare sector; uniting a consortium of 12 HEIs, six SMEs, a hospital, a research center, and two networking organizations. This pan-European endeavor will push forward with 20 bachelor’s and 26 master’s programs with 16 self-standing modules for lifelong learning. Agile to its core, SUSA is strategically designed to produce 6558 graduates and 660 working professionals proficient in digital health data competencies. 

SUSA education model is based on 20 commonly agreed learning objectives that focus on recognised digital skills gaps of the European healthcare ecosystem. These objectives will be systematically embedded in the curriculum of single degree programs of HEIs in 9 European countries (NL, FI, IE, HR, GR, SK, PL, ES, TR). The model is based on a collaborative pedagogical approach, through shared learning experiences, that will be co-designed and co-delivered by the consortium members. The healthcare ecosystem will serve as the cornerstone for facilitating learning, ensuring a cohesive and integrated educational journey in the pursuit of digital excellence within healthcare. 

SUSA stands apart through its sheer innovative multidisciplinary curriculum, addressing present and future digital competency needs that are essential for health data sharing. The European healthcare digital single market brings forth the dire need that health data sharing holds for Europe's healthcare ecosystem. SUSA is not only supporting this movement, it is at the forefront of this transformative wave. SUSA’s educational model will empower healthcare delivery with data-driven insights, actively supporting the objectives of the European Green Deal. We are committed to fostering a healthier European society, leveraging the power of education to cultivate new generations to come.

Name: Shift+R
MINERVA European Support Centre for Scalable AI Research and Deployment
Description:
# MINERVA: Empowering Europe's AI Future Through High-Performance Computing

MINERVA stands at the forefront of European innovation, serving as a transformative hub that bridges advanced High-Performance Computing (HPC) with artificial intelligence communities across Europe. Our mission is to accelerate AI research and development by making cutting-edge HPC infrastructure accessible to ML/AI researchers and developers.
Through our comprehensive three-tier support system, we enable AI teams to seamlessly integrate their workloads with powerful HPC systems, while providing specialized support for pre-training and customizing large-scale open foundation models. Our commitment to open-source development strengthens Europe's digital sovereignty and fosters innovation across the ecosystem.
## What sets MINERVA apart:

1. Access to state-of-the-art HPC infrastructure
2. Expert-led training programs and best practice guides
3. Extensive datasets and software resources
4. Dynamic Community Hub connecting AI researchers, developers, and HPC specialists
5. Support for open foundation model development and customization

As a cornerstone initiative of EuroHPC and the European Commission's digital strategy, MINERVA is shaping Europe's leadership in the AI revolution, driving innovation in scientific research, industry applications, and beyond.
Join us in building Europe's AI future. #EuropeanAI #HPC #MachineLearning #Innovation #DigitalTransformation

The MINERVA project has received funding from the European High-Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (JU) under grant agreement No 101182737. The JU receives support from the Digital Europe Programme.
Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or EuroHPC JU. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Contact us at: info@minerva4ai.eu

Name: SMACITE
Description:
The project aims to address the skills gap of Smart Cities technicians and engineers, by designing and testing a vocational education and 
training program that is based on a novel and multi-disciplinary curriculum combining digital skills on Smart Cities enabling technologies, 
with soft, entrepreneurship and green skills. 
The expected project outputs are: 
• A Smart Cities competences map and ESCO-compliant Smart Cities job profiles. 
• A Smart Cities curriculum combining both technical and non-technical skills and competences and promoting personalized learning 
pathways. 
• Learning resources for Smart Cities enabling technologies and for building the soft, entrepreneurship and green skills of Smart Cities 
technicians and Engineers. 
• A diagnostic tool to identify personalized learning pathways. 
• A MOOC for Smart Cities enabling technologies. 
• Virtual Worlds for building the soft, green and entrepreneurship skills of Smart Cities technicians and engineer

The main project beneficiaries are Smart Cities technician and engineers either from the public sector (i.e. municipalities) or enterprises 
providing Smart Cities solutions, as well as HEI and VET students interested in Smart Cities. 
The curriculum will be tested through 4 national pilots in Greece, Bulgaria, Spain and Italy with at least 160 trainees. The certification of the 
skills and competences will follow a two-fold approach: (a) using micro-credentials to recognize the knowledge and skills gained through 
the successful completion of each online training module at the MOOC and Virtual Worlds and (b) designing the “Smart Cities Specialization Certification” that will be awarded to those passing online certifications exams with e-proctoring after the completion of the 
training modules. 
The project will create an ecosystem for the co-design and co-development of an innovative curriculum and technology-enhanced learning 
tools for the upskilling/reskilling of Smart Cities technicians and engineer

Name: AssistiV Ireland
Description:
Assistiv Ireland provides assistive technology solutions for individuals with learning/intellectual disabilities and autism to remove barriers to employment. 

Service View, our 'hospitality' technology, is designed to integrate with existing order and pay systems and uses iconography to present orders on wearable tech, assisting with verbal communication, short-term memory, orientation, identifying products, and money management. It also allows for more control over interactions with customers. 

Our 'task/operations' manager technology uses Near-field communication (NFC) stickers to provide instructions for completing tasks, enabling employees to work independently in various industries. 

The low-code, bespoke platform allows for customisation and personalisation. By leveraging Assistiv Ireland's technology solutions for individuals with learning/intellectual disabilities and autism, employers can reduce the time and resources needed to support and onboard new employees while empowering a pool of 34,000 individuals to fill vacant roles and create new job opportunities.

Name: Mente
Description:
Most mental health and wellbeing platforms focus on access to counsellors, mindfulness apps, or short-term wellbeing campaigns. They raise awareness but rarely address the causes of poor mental health at work.

Mente is different.

Mente was built for employers — not as another wellbeing app, but as a compliance and risk management system designed to prevent issues before they escalate.

The platform helps organisations understand, evidence, and act on the factors that affect workplace mental health and safety, including stress, harassment, workload, and how work is managed. Every action is tracked, every risk is visible, and every step is documented through a built-in strategy report powered by real-time employee feedback.

Employees benefit from confidential support, wellbeing resources, and a safe way to share feedback through surveys and anonymous reporting tools. Employers benefit from visibility, evidence, and compliance.

Mente isn’t just a wellbeing platform — it’s a complete Workplace Mental Health Management System.

Name: JAM Card for Business
Description:
Discover in Just A Minute why leading global brands choose JAM Card to make their workplaces more inclusive, efficient, and happier. 

JAM Card is a simple and discreet way to break down barriers, allowing people with non-visible disabilities to let others know they need "Just a Minute" of patience and support. JAM Card has been developed for and by people with hidden disabilities so they can communicate that they need "Just a Minute" of patience. It is available FREE for anyone who needs one—either as a physical card or digitally from the app.

Training
We offer online training to support your business in becoming JAM Card Friendly. People with invisible disabilities often feel excluded in workplaces. Becoming JAM Card Friendly helps to reduce the risk of stigma and discrimination. It benefits both your internal and external customers. Thousands of people have already successfully completed our online training which offers a positive, interactive, and data-driven learning experience. 

What’s included in JAM Card e-Learning?
- What is a JAM Card and what disabilities are invisible?
- How to provide inclusive customer service
- How your work environment can impact people with invisible disabilities
- Real-life examples of how to deliver excellent customer service in potentially difficult scenarios
- e-Certificate for successfully completing the quiz

How businesses benefit:
- Building your "Social" in ESG (Environment, Social, and Governance)
- Upskill your team; JAM Card e-Learning takes approx 20 mins to complete
* Once 70% of your staff have successfully completed the online training, you become a JAM Card Friendly Business
- Gain access to JAM Card bolt-ons, including additional training, secret shopper services, and use of the JAM Card logo and promotional materials
- Membership in the global JAM Card network of organisations and users

Join leading international brands and choose JAM Card as your trusted Disability Inclusion Partner TODAY!

Name: UP and SPACE Martinique
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?
Up & Space est une structure pionnière de l’inclusion numérique aux Antilles, reconnue pour son expertise et son engagement. Labellisée Hub territorial pour un numérique inclusif par l’ANCT depuis 2019 et PTCE émergent depuis 2024, notre organisation se positionne comme un acteur clé de la transformation numérique et sociale des territoires.

Notre mission est de réduire les fractures numériques et sociales en accompagnant les acteurs publics, les associations, les entreprises et les citoyens dans l’appropriation du numérique. Nous développons des actions structurantes autour de quatre axes : la formation et la montée en compétences, l’appui à la création et à l’animation de tiers-lieux, la mise en réseau des acteurs, et l’accompagnement de projets innovants à fort impact social.

Notre expérience s’appuie sur une expertise reconnue en ingénierie de formation, en coordination territoriale et en innovation sociale. Nous portons notamment des dispositifs nationaux comme LES HUBS TERRITORIAUX pour un numérique inclusif  (Hub MEDNUM Antilles) ou encore le PAQTE (Pacte Avec les Quartiers Pour Toutes les Entreprises), et nous développons des projets d’avant-garde tels que A.L.I.S.S. (Accompagnement en Liaison Inclusive Santé et Social), qui associe santé, inclusion numérique et solidarité.

Ancrés en Martinique et en Guadeloupe, nous inscrivons notre action dans une dynamique d’expansion : essaimer nos solutions vers d’autres territoires ultramarins, en France hexagonale et à l’international. Notre vision repose sur la coopération, la mutualisation des ressources et le déploiement de modèles inclusifs, capables de s’adapter aux réalités locales.

Nous croyons à la force du numérique comme levier d’égalité, de créativité et de développement durable. Chez Up & Space, nous transformons chaque défi territorial en opportunité d’innovation et de progrès partagé.

Name: CatalunIA
Description:
CatalunIA — Divulgació científica (IA i ciència agèntica)

CatalunIA és un projecte de divulgació científica orientat a l'evolució de l'automatització de la ciència i de la recerca:

 Intel·ligència Artificial (inclosa IA agèntica) 
 Automatització científica 
 Neurociència computacional 
 Matemàtica i fonaments algorítmics 
 Fonaments quàntics

Aquí no busquem titulars: busquem criteri.
Analitzem articles científics, revisem evidència metodológica, explicitem tendències meta-analítiques i assenyalem limitacions actuals.

 Calendari setmanal de publicació

Dilluns — Setmanari IA 
Selecció comentada de notícies rellevants: què s’afirma, quines proves hi ha i què podria estar sobredimensionat.

Dimarts — Blog divulgatiu tècnic 
Peça divulgativa + focus conceptual + referències tècniques: definicions, intuïcions i formalització quan cal.

Dimecres — Comentari de paper científic setmanal 
Comentari destacat (article o preprint): problema, mètode, baselines, resultats i limitacions.

Dijous — Blog divulgatiu tècnic (Ciència Agèntica) 
Sistemes agèntics i automatització científica/recerca: disseny, avaluació, control, i implicacions metodològiques.

Divendres — Comentari de paper científic setmanal 
Segon comentari destacat (article o preprint): problema, mètode, baselines, resultats i limitacions.

Cap de setmana — Podcast / Carrusel d’infografies

Name: LCDigi
Description:
LCDigi es un Proyecto, con una base, AYUDAR. Tanto a profesionales activos, que están quedando desfasados ante la velocidad con la que la digitalización y el Lean Management se está instaurando, como a nuestros jóvenes, de los que tenemos el falso concepto de que son "gurús" de lo tecnológico (son gurús de redes sociales y videojuegos, NO tienen conocimientos orientados al mercado laboral). Por tanto, unos NO están preparados ni para mantener sus puestos de trabajo, y los otros para aspirar a los mismos. El boom digital demanda personas con conocimientos muy específicos y, sobre todo, tecnológicos. Esta es la preocupante realidad. A ello le sumamos las pequeñas empresas que no pueden hacer frente a una digitalización adaptada a su escenario real, pues la mayoría de soluciones están orientadas a grandes negocios, y los costes de implementación son inaccesibles.

 

   Y el hecho de digitalizarse sin un criterio de transformación acertado, puede ser muy peligroso. Es por ello, que cuando hablamos de LCDigi, hablamos de un Proyecto, un fin. Que no es más que mitigar este impacto, que generará desempleo en profesionales que ya han superado los 35-40 años (tras años en empresas que los están empezando a sustituir por perfiles más "digitales"), y estancamiento profesional de nuestros jóvenes, en puestos básicos, sin posibilidad de crecimiento, y en poco tiempo, ni siquiera acceso a los mismos. Aportamos nuestras soluciones adaptadas a estos entornos excluidos, ya sea a nivel de negocio o de formación. Resumen: Queremos aportar nuestro grano de arena. "A rio revuelto, ganancia de pescadores, tu decides si eres "pescador" o "pescado". Adicionalmente, se da formación de todo tipo a niñ@s con TDAH y Asperger, los cuales son 100% funcionales, e incluso aportan valor añadido por su neurodiversidad. Es por ello, que procuramos detectar sus potenciales, que tod@s los tienen, para focalizar en ellos y de ese modo catalizar de forma exponencial sus perfiles personales y didácticos.

Name: TedoGEN
Description:
В сучасному світі ІТ, де ринок переповнений і конкуренція зашкалює, новачкам без практичного досвіду стає дедалі складніше знайти своє місце. З цієї причини TEDOGEN, ініціатива Tedo Group, пропонує неперевершену можливість для молодих талантів, які прагнуть розпочати свою кар'єру в ІТ. Наша програма забезпечує унікальний шанс набуття комерційного досвіду через участь у благодійних проектах, що дозволяє не тільки вдосконалювати навички, але й робити справжній соціальний вплив.

Важливим аспектом нашої пропозиції є можливість працювати поряд із досвідченими фахівцями середнього (Middle) та вищого (Senior) рівнів, які готові поділитися своїми знаннями та досвідом. Це не просто наставництво; це реальний шанс вчитися у кращих, розвивати власний професійний шлях і формувати міцну основу для майбутньої кар'єри.

Ми в TEDOGEN переконані, що доступ до якісної освіти та реального досвіду роботи є ключем до успіху в технологічній галузі. Саме тому ми створили платформу, де кожен здатен не лише навчатися, але й застосовувати набуті знання на практиці, відкриваючи нові горизонти та можливості для себе.

"Вперед, до нових висот: TEDOGEN – ваша платформа для зльоту" є нашим гаслом та обіцянкою кожному, хто приєднується до нас. Віримо, що разом ми можемо змінити не тільки життя наших учасників, але й внести свій вклад у розвиток технологічної галузі, підтримуючи нове покоління ІТ-спеціалістів, готових до викликів сьогодення.

Name: Oracle Database Academy
Description:
Welcome to Oracle Database Academy your first step towards becoming a professional Oracle Database Administrator.

I'm Satnam Shergill Founder of ODA, with over 20 years of hands-on commercial experience as an Oracle database administrator. Throughout my career I have worked for many FTSE-100 companies, working on some of the largest & most complex databases to date. From IBM, Capgemini, Office of National Statistics and the Ministry of Defense to name but a few.

I have put these courses together to teach you my knowledge and skill-set that I have acquired over my career to fully equip you to manage an Oracle Database with ease and confidence. 

My courses are designed to teach/take you from beginner to expert level, starting from the ground up by teaching you the fundamental Concepts of a Database. Furthermore, giving you a solid working foundation to develop your skills to industry expert standards. 

Upon completion of my courses, you will be able to install, upgrade, and perform routine backup & recovery tasks when required, and tune a poorly performing database to its optimal performance. You will also be able to figure out and solve simple to complex problems working to a methodical approach. You will gain this knowledge from a real-life Oracle Administrator, not some classroom teacher with no commercial experience just regurgitating the manual to you.

Our in-person classroom experience gives you the opportunity to interact & engage with the speaker. Providing you with invaluable insights & experiences, A Real Value For Money

We're not just some pre-recorded online course!!

Name: DevOpsEnlight
Description:
DevOps Enlight is an innovative online training platform and DevOps consultancy, dedicated to providing hands-on, project-based learning for aspiring DevOps engineers, software developers, and IT professionals. From automating pipelines to optimizing infrastructure, we bring the expertise and experience necessary to drive efficient and scalable DevOps practices.

DevOps Training: Real-world projects that cover the entire DevOps pipeline, from development to deployment.
DevOps Consultancy: Expert advice and hands-on support for businesses looking to implement or improve their DevOps processes.
Project-Based Work: We undertake DevOps project work for individuals and companies, delivering tailored solutions for automation, cloud, and infrastructure management.
Comprehensive Curriculum: Covering tools and techniques like Linux, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and more.
Job-Ready Training: Skills and confidence to excel in job interviews and thrive in a DevOps role.

Name: MTS Class
Description:
At MTS Class, founded by Jerry Follot back in 2012, we're all about creating an immersive learning experience that's as exciting as it is educational. Picture Jerry, our CEO, a tech whiz with a passion for teaching, crafting a curriculum that's not just about theory but also about diving headfirst into real-world tech challenges.

Jerry's journey started at the University of Maryland, where a Linux course sparked his interest and set him on this incredible path. Today, while he's busy as a Linux System Admin and consultant for the US government, he still finds time to collaborate with IT schools in Africa, spreading his knowledge far and wide.

Now, let's talk about our admission process—it's like finding the perfect puzzle piece. We're not just looking for students; we're hunting for the next generation of tech superstars. With two rounds of interviews and an orientation task, we sift through the talent pool to find those special individuals who are ready to dive deep into the world of IT.

And once you're in, get ready for a journey! Our program runs for 16 weeks, with classes four days a week, three hours a day. It's intense, but trust us, it's worth it. Plus, you'll be joining a vibrant community of learners from all corners of the globe—talk about diversity!

At MTS Class, it's not just about coding; it's about fostering a supportive environment where everyone can thrive and grow. So, if you're ready to embark on an adventure that will shape your future in tech, you've come to the right place.

Name: Think XR
Description:
Think XR project is aimed at establishing a curriculum and new teaching modules in the field of augmented and virtual reality.

Augmented reality technologies represent a new, modern digital and interactive medium and are recognized in Europe as one of the key new digital technologies (Expert Workshop on Interactive Technologies). In combination with top-notch technological equipment, the creation of content and services and the provision of user experience, they enable the realization of innovative and economically competitive solutions.

Their potential is reflected in a number of analytical studies that address the lack of skills and knowledge in the fields of information and communication technologies, informatics and computer science, and multimedia. In particular, the lack of knowledge, training programs and personnel in the fields of augmented reality, user interface development and experience is highlighted.

According to the leading analytical houses, augmented reality is one of the main technological trends of 2021, and it is also predicted to continue its rapid growth in the next 5 years. Due to the restrictions that apply in the context of COVID-19, the use of XR technologies is only gaining momentum, as it enables remote work and the creation of simulation environments for learning, collaboration and socializing. Technologies are also increasingly gaining ground in the processes of the creative and entertainment industry, entrepreneurship, trade, industry 4.0, healthcare, and above all, exceptional shifts are taking place in the field of school education development.

By establishing new and upgraded educational programs, we will enable pupils and students to access technologies and tools in augmented reality. Together with teachers, mentors and experts from companies, we will use the Design Thinking method to define appropriate work groups and check them within the pilot activities (Living lab).

Name: Onion Training
Description:
At Onion Training, we specialise in turning software testing novices into confident pros. With over 50 years of combined industry experience, our expert instructors break down the complexities of software testing into digestible, actionable lessons. 

Whether you're just starting your testing career, an experienced tester looking to sharpen your skills, or someone transitioning into the tech world, we’ve got you covered.

Our Story
Onion was born out of our passion and expertise as software testing consultants. With a combined 50 years of experience in the field, we shared a common goal: to create a Software Testing Course that’s both accessible and comprehensive. As we ventured into this project, we quickly realised a significant gap in the availability of coherent resources for newcomers to this dynamic field. Whether you're aiming to start as a Junior Tester or climb the ranks to QA Manager, the training options are often limited.

Our mission is crystal clear - bridge that gap and share our extensive knowledge with aspiring testers. We’re committed to building a nurturing digital community where both new and experienced testers can connect, exchange insights and elevate their skills. Through education, mentorship and job opportunities, we strive to empower testers in their professional journey.

Why Onion?
The name "Onion" represents the very essence of software testing - peeling back layers of code to reveal hidden bugs and issues. Just as testing reveals the deeper workings of software, our courses uncover the skills you need to succeed in the industry.

What’s in it for You?
Gain hands-on, real-world testing skills that can set you apart in a competitive market. Learn from our industry-backed instructors and get the knowledge you need to excel, whether you’re a beginner or looking to advance.

Ready to take the next step?
Follow us here on LinkedIn and start your software testing journey with Onion Training today. Your future in software testing begins now!

Description:
"The Way"
Votre Partenaire en Recrutement, Formation, Consulting et Coaching d'Emploi

 À propos de nous

Chez The way, nous nous engageons à créer des opportunités et à favoriser la croissance professionnelle. En tant qu'experts en recrutement, formation, consulting et coaching d'emploi, nous apportons des solutions sur mesure aux individus et aux entreprises qui cherchent à exceller dans un marché du travail en constante évolution.

Nos Services :
 Recrutement : Nous sommes votre partenaire de confiance pour identifier et recruter les talents exceptionnels qui feront progresser votre entreprise. Notre processus rigoureux de sélection et d'évaluation garantit que nous trouvons le candidat idéal pour chaque poste.

 Formation : Nous proposons des programmes de formation de pointe pour développer les compétences de vos équipes et favoriser leur succès à long terme. Nos formateurs expérimentés sont là pour vous guider à chaque étape.

 Consulting : Notre équipe de consultants chevronnés travaille main dans la main avec votre organisation pour résoudre des problèmes complexes liés aux RH, à la gestion du personnel et à la stratégie d'entreprise.

 Coaching d'Emploi : Nous offrons un accompagnement individuel et personnalisé aux professionnels à la recherche de nouvelles opportunités ou cherchant à évoluer dans leur carrière. Notre objectif est de les aider à atteindre leurs objectifs professionnels.

Chez The Way Academy, nous croyons en la puissance de l'investissement dans le capital humain. Nous sommes fiers de contribuer au succès de nos clients en créant des solutions sur mesure qui font la différence.

 Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour discuter de la manière dont nous pouvons répondre à vos besoins en recrutement, formation, consulting et coaching d'emploi. Ensemble, nous pouvons bâtir un avenir professionnel plus brillant.

Name: Center Cursos | Pessoas e Tecnologia
Description:
Desde 1998 a Center Cursos realiza cursos avançados de tecnologia, onde atuou como Centro de Treinamento Oficial Microsoft, Centro de Certificações Prometric. Realiza cursos nas áreas de: Programação, Banco de Dados, Redes, Servidores, Web Designer, Web Developer, Programas Gráficos, Gestão de Projetos, ITIL, ISO 27002, Empreendedorismo, Marketing Digital, Business Intelligence, Office avançado e outros.

Consagrada pela qualidade dos cursos, treinou e certificou milhares dos atuais profissionais atuantes no mercado.

Usinas, indústrias, construtoras, empresas de tecnologia e instituições de ensino são nossos maiores clientes.

Ganhadora de vários prêmios regionais e dois a nível américa latina em 2012 e um no mundial WPC em 2013, o maior evento mundial Microsoft, na competência Learning.

Em nova fase estratégica, a Center Cursos atua com os tradicionais cursos presenciais em turmas abertas, porém com  mais treinamentos para turmas fechadas em Instituições de Ensino e para Empresas, em qualquer lugar do Brasil, com cursos próprios ou de parceiros especializados.

O atual modelo de entrega de treinamentos corporativos in company é a melhor opção para as empresas, pois as agendas são feitas pelo cliente, há a possibilidade de personalização dos cursos, a empresa isenta-se de riscos de deslocamento de funcionários e eliminam-se custos adicionais com viagens e hospedagens.

A tradicional qualidade de nossos cursos, agora com maior proximidade ao RH de sua empresa, formam a parceria perfeita para atingir os objetivos dos treinamentos.

CONTE CONOSCO,  nós vamos até sua empresa ou instituição de ensino!

Name: Seo expart Aklima Akter
Description:
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is a crucial digital marketing strategy aimed at enhancing a website's visibility and organic (non-paid) traffic on search engine results pages (SERPs). By optimizing various on-page and off-page elements, businesses and website owners can improve their chances of ranking higher on search engines like Google, Bing, and Yahoo.

On-page SEO involves optimizing individual web pages by incorporating relevant keywords, creating high-quality content, optimizing meta tags (such as title tags and meta descriptions), using descriptive URLs, and ensuring proper internal linking. Additionally, on-page SEO focuses on improving the overall user experience, including page load speed, mobile-friendliness, and structured data markup.

Off-page SEO, on the other hand, centers around building a strong online presence and reputation. This includes generating high-quality backlinks from reputable websites, engaging in guest blogging, social media promotion, influencer collaborations, and other strategies that contribute to a website's authority and credibility in the eyes of search engines.

Technical SEO involves optimizing the website's technical infrastructure to ensure search engines can crawl and index the site effectively. This may involve tasks such as optimizing site structure, improving website speed, implementing HTTPS for security, creating and submitting sitemaps, and ensuring mobile responsiveness.

Local SEO is vital for businesses targeting a specific geographic area. It focuses on optimizing a website to appear in local search results, such as Google Maps and local business directories. This often involves creating or claiming a Google My Business listing, obtaining positive reviews, and ensuring consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information across various online platforms.

Name: Exqueezeer
Description:
La mayoría de empresas invierten en tecnología, pero no preparan adecuadamente a sus equipos para utilizarla con eficacia.

El resultado es conocido: herramientas infrautilizadas, procesos ineficientes, baja productividad y un mayor riesgo de errores humanos o brechas de seguridad.

Formar al equipo ya no es una opción. Es una decisión estratégica.

En EXQUEEZEER diseñamos e impartimos formación práctica, breve y directamente aplicable, para que las personas trabajen mejor con las herramientas digitales que ya utilizan o están a punto de incorporar.

Nos enfocamos en cuatro áreas clave:

Productividad digital: Aprovecha al máximo Microsoft 365, Google Workspace y otras soluciones colaborativas.

Ciberseguridad: No basta con conocer riesgos; hay que cambiar hábitos. Campañas de phishing simulado y formaciones alineadas con INCIBE.

Inteligencia Artificial: Aprende a aplicar la IA generativa en tareas reales, de forma segura y eficaz.

Analítica de Datos: Define los indicadores clave de tu negocio y toma decisiones basadas en datos con Excel y Power BI.

Nuestra metodología se adapta al día a día de la empresa: píldoras de 30 minutos, grupos reducidos, sesiones en directo y bonificables al 100% a través de FUNDAE. Formación diseñada para que tenga impacto desde la primera sesión.

EXQUEEZEER no imparte cursos. Acompaña a las organizaciones que quieren aprovechar de verdad su tecnología.

Com mais de duas décadas de experiência, atuamos lado a lado com nossos clientes para entender a operação, enxergar os gargalos e simplificar os processos. Sempre com foco em resultado, mas também com respeito ao ritmo e à realidade de cada negócio.

Menos ajuste, mais Protheus. Essa é a essência do nosso trabalho: fazer o sistema funcionar como deveria, explorando o que ele tem de melhor — com clareza, leveza e sem depender de “gambiarras” ou customizações desnecessárias.

Somos consultores, mas também somos parceiros. Porque no fim, tecnologia só faz sentido se ajudar pessoas a trabalharem melhor.

Name: Pelican Valley
Description:
Pelican Valley is India's pioneering integrated technology park and residential community strategically located between Chennai, Tirupati, and Nellore. We're not just building another IT park - we're creating a purpose-built ecosystem that solves two of India's biggest challenges: graduate unemployment and urban congestion.

Our Vision: The Triple Helix Approach

Our unique Triple Helix model combines three essential elements:

1. Talent & Skill Development

We transform aspiring engineering graduates from Tier 2 and 3 colleges into job-ready Salesforce professionals. With the Salesforce ecosystem expected to create over 1.3 million jobs in India by 2026, we're bridging this talent gap while unlocking earning potential for thousands of graduates.

2. Technology & Innovation

Our IT Park specializes in high-demand areas like Supply Chain Technologies, Logistics, Manufacturing, and AI-driven solutions. We provide companies with an affordable alternative to expensive metro locations while maintaining world-class infrastructure and talent access.

3. Sustainable Residency

Our premium residential community offers eco-friendly living with amenities like Miyawaki forests, walking trails, solar energy options, and professional property management services. It's perfect for employees, investors, and especially NRIs looking for fully-managed property investments.

Strategic Location Advantage

Located on 20+ acres with roads on two sides (Chennai-Kolkata National Highway and Vedurupattu SEZ Road), Pelican Valley offers:

•	Easy access to Chennai, Tirupati, and Nellore
•	Proximity to major SEZs like Sri City, Apache, and Vedurupattu
•	Close to prestigious institutions like IIT Tirupati, IISER, and Sri Venkateswara University
•	Near the world's most visited pilgrimage center (Tirupati)

Join us in building the future - where innovation, purpose, and community come together to create extraordinary opportunities.

Name: JUST_MAKE
Description:
"JUST_MAKE – nowoczesne rozwiązania IT z pasją"

JUST_MAKE to firma informatyczna, która łączy profesjonalizm z pasją. Jesteśmy informatykami z wyboru i z zawodu, a naszym priorytetem jest satysfakcja klientów. Oferujemy kompleksowe usługi w zakresie serwisu komputerowego, pomocy IT, szkoleń oraz rozwoju oprogramowania, wspierając zarówno klientów indywidualnych, jak i firmy oraz instytucje publiczne. Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu w branży, nasze usługi stoją na najwyższym poziomie, zapewniając sprawne działanie systemów i realne wsparcie w codziennej pracy.
Specjalizujemy się w tworzeniu i rozwijaniu oprogramowania – od prostych narzędzi po zaawansowane systemy bazodanowe. Jako software house butikowy oferujemy programowanie w PL/SQL, rozwój i optymalizację baz danych, implementację procedur, wyzwalaczy i procesów ETL, a także integrację systemów i analizę danych, dostosowaną do indywidualnych potrzeb.
Równolegle wspieramy naszych klientów w projektowaniu i wdrażaniu stron internetowych – od koncepcji, przez front-end i back-end, po optymalizację i utrzymanie. Tworzymy rozwiązania responsywne, estetyczne i zgodne z nowoczesnymi standardami.
JUST_MAKE to także obsługa serwisowa: instalacja i konfiguracja sprzętu, systemów operacyjnych, oprogramowania oraz sieci LAN/WAN, a także pomoc przy doborze i zakupie rozwiązań IT. Udzielamy fachowych porad przy wyborze laptopów, komputerów czy urządzeń mobilnych, uwzględniając realne potrzeby użytkowników.
Nasza oferta obejmuje również szkolenia indywidualne i grupowe, wsparcie techniczne po zakończeniu zleceń oraz długofalową współpracę na partnerskich zasadach. Każde zlecenie traktujemy indywidualnie, analizując potrzeby klienta i proponując optymalne rozwiązania.

JUST_MAKE – Twój partner w świecie technologii.

Name: HTTP Alapítvány
Description:
A HTTP Alapítvány közhasznú szervezet, ami nevében is felvállaltan (A Hálózati Tudás Terjesztéséért Programiroda Alapítvány) a piacképes informatikai szaktudás minél szélesebb körben történő elterjesztését tűzte ki zászlajára. A mai gazdasági és munkaerő piaci körülmények között roppant fontos, hogy a tehetséges és munkára kész fiatalok hozzájuthassanak azokhoz a szakmai ismeretekhez és végzettségekhez, ami a megfelelő munkahelyen történő elhelyezkedésükhöz szükséges. Az informatikai iparág és különösen a hálózati informatika olyan terület, ahol nem csak európai- vagy világszinten, de Magyarországon is hiány van jól felkészült szakemberekből. Hisszük, hogy a piacképes informatikai szakképzés feltétele, hogy a diák, tanár és tananyag hármas kapcsolat minden eleme a helyén legyen. Az Alapítványnál azon dolgozunk, hogy a magyarországi informatikai szakképző intézményeknél e hármas egységet minél jobban erősítsük.

Támogatjuk az ipar által is elismert, világszínvonalú tananyagok magyarországi meghonosítását, népszerűsítését.

Tanártovábbképzéseken, oktatói kurzusokon készítjük fel a tanárokat e tananyagok megfelelő színvonalú oktatására, de segítjük az intézményeket a képzés feltételeinek biztosításában is.

Tehetséggondozással, szakmai versenyek szervezésével, a diákok elhelyezkedésének támogatásával igyekszünk követendő pozitív példákat mutatni.

Olyan partnereket tudhatunk magunk mellett, mint a több ezer diákot számláló Cisco Hálózati Akadémia, vagy a Microsoft IT Akadémia. A HTTP Alapítvány a Cisco Hálózati Akadémia program magyarországi Támogató Központja és Oktatóképző Központja. 

Az Alapítvány akkreditált felnőttképzési intézet (felnőttképzési engedélyszám: E-000910/2014), korszerűen felszerelt oktatótermében rendszeresen zajlanak a képzések, melyekbe bárki bekapcsolódhat, aki kedvet és erőt érez a hálózati tudás megszerzéséhez, és szeretné javítani az esélyeit a munkaerőpiacon.

সতরাং যারা অনলাইন ভিত্তিক Skill ডেভলপমেন্টের মাধ্যমে ঘরে বসে কিছু আয়-রোজগার করতে আগ্রহী, তারা ETDP এর সাথে নিজেকে Connect করেনিন।

কেননা ETDP কর্তৃক আয়োজিত বিভিন্ন বিষয়ের Skill (হালাল রিজিকের খোঁজে, মেটা বিজনেস/ফেসবুক মার্কেটিং, ইউটিউব মার্কেটিং, নিজেস্ব এফিলিয়েট মার্কেটিং ও বাংলা ব্লগিং ) ডেভলপমেন্টের মাধ্যমে ছোট-ছোট আয় করা শুরু করেছেন। 

বিস্তারিত আরো জানতে ETDP কর্তৃক আয়োজিত "হালাল রিযিকের অন্বেষণে "প্রোগ্রামটির ওয়েবসাইটে ( https://halalrizikerkhoje.com/ ) ভিজিট  করুন।
