Name: FABI - Frameworks for AI-Based Innovation
Description:
FABI (Frameworks for AI-Based Innovation) is a Vienna-based non-profit dedicated to guiding organizations through the complexities of AI compliance, aligning with the EU AI Act, GDPR, ISO9001/27001/42001, NIST and HIPAA. Our mission is to support responsible AI innovation while protecting businesses from legal and reputational risks.

We provide a comprehensive suite of services:

- Compliance Audit & Risk Assessment: Evaluating AI systems to identify compliance gaps and assess risks in data handling, algorithmic transparency, and human oversight, ensuring full regulatory alignment.

- Customized Action Plan & Strategy Development: Crafting tailored action plans that integrate compliance activities with your business strategy, offering clear steps to achieve and maintain EU AI Act compliance.

- AI Compliance Training & Education: Delivering training on AI compliance, data management, bias mitigation, and human oversight to equip your team with the skills to meet regulatory standards.

- Foundation Setup & Implementation Support: Establishing compliance processes and monitoring tools, integrating them into daily operations for sustained adherence to regulatory requirements.

- Continuous Compliance Monitoring & Ongoing Support: Providing regular updates, strategic advice, and expert support to help your organization stay compliant as regulations evolve.

FABI is committed to fostering trust in AI technologies through effective compliance solutions, ensuring that innovation is both legally sound and ethically responsible. We believe that by aligning AI systems with regulatory frameworks, we can help build safer, more transparent, and equitable AI applications.

Visit our website to learn more, sign up for our newsletter, or follow our LinkedIn page for updates. For direct inquiries or collaboration opportunities, feel free to write to us at contact@fabi.institute. 

Let’s shape the future of AI together!

Un atelier collaboratif où l’imagination prend vie grâce aux outils et aux technologies de fabrication numérique !

Nous avons déjà réalisé plusieurs créations innovantes et originales :

 Un vélo smoothie pour allier sport et gourmandise.
 Une borne d’arcade rétro pour replonger dans les années 80.
 Des projets plus petits mais pas des moindre 
 D’autres idées en préparation... et peut-être la tienne bientôt ?

Que tu veuilles prototyper, apprendre ou simplement échanger, il y aura toujours quelqu’un pour t’aider et partager ses connaissances.

 Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?

 Un lieu inspirant pour apprendre et tester de nouvelles technologies.
 Une équipe motivée prête à t’accompagner dans tes projets.
 Une ambiance fun et conviviale où tout le monde s’entraide.

Alors, prêt(e) à donner vie à tes idées ?  Viens découvrir le Fablab et fabrique le futur avec nous. On a hâte de voir ce que tu imagines !

Name: Zeron
Description:
¿Qué es ZERON?
ZERON es una empresa de tecnología educativa (EdTech) que diseña y construye ecosistemas de aprendizaje inteligentes. No somos solo una herramienta; somos el socio estratégico para instituciones educativas y empresas que buscan liderar la transformación digital en la formación de talento.
Nuestra misión es potenciar el aprendizaje global integrando Inteligencia Artificial y automatización para crear experiencias más personalizadas, eficientes e impactantes.
¿Qué Hacemos?
En ZERON, fusionamos la robustez de plataformas líderes como Moodle con una capa de inteligencia y funcionalidad avanzada, creando una solución unificada que permite:
Implementar Aprendizaje Personalizado a Escala: Nuestros algoritmos de IA analizan el comportamiento y el progreso del usuario para adaptar las rutas de aprendizaje, recomendar contenido relevante y ofrecer apoyo justo en el momento necesario.
Automatizar la Gestión Educativa: Liberamos a docentes y administradores de tareas repetitivas (calificaciones, inscripciones, reportes) para que puedan enfocarse en lo que realmente importa: la calidad pedagógica y la interacción humana.
Generar Insights Predictivos: A través de dashboards inteligentes, no solo mostramos qué ha pasado, sino que ayudamos a predecir qué pasará. Identificamos estudiantes en riesgo, medimos la efectividad de un programa y proporcionamos datos clave para la toma de decisiones estratégicas.

Name: Data Savvy Ltd
Description: THE 3-PILLARS OF A DATA-SAVVY BUSINESS... 1. EXPERTISE - Having access to a dedicated analytics resource For many smaller organisations their scale doesn't warrant employing a permanent data analyst on their team. Even those organisations that feel they can justify this are struggling to recruit what is an increasingly high demand role. We've spent the last three decades providing data analytics insight for companies and organisations across a wide range of sectors and based upon this experience we're confident that whatever challenge your business is facing the answer will lie in your own data... 2. SKILLS - Building data literacy skills throughout your business Whilst "one man can make a difference" "many hands make light work". I've been working with organisations to leverage the vast resource across within staff through training focused on increasing data literacy, developing analytical skills and building confidence to work with data. Helping your staff become more data savvy will improve productivity, enhance competitive advantage and reduce reliance on the specialised (internal or external) analytics resource. 3. SYSTEMS & TOOLS - empowering staff with access to your data Too often the data that is available within organisations is locked away and inaccessible, either through design or by default. Data's frequently poor quality and held in unconnected silos. Using the latest tools, including Microsofts Power BI environment, bringing these different sources into a unified view of your business is easily within reach of even the smallest organisation. Thorough training and support, using the tools already available to your team via their Microsoft 365 licences, we can help them link into this central data mart and start changing the way they work, and your business operates. Get in touch to start your journey of building a data-savvy business!

Gepetia est une entreprise dédiée à transformer l'interaction des entreprises avec l'intelligence artificielle (IA). Notre mission est de rendre l'IA accessible et compréhensible pour tous, en mettant l'accent particulier sur la formation et l'éducation.

Chez Gepetia, nous croyons que la clé du succès dans l'ère numérique réside non seulement dans l'adoption de technologies avancées, mais aussi dans la compréhension profonde de celles-ci. C'est pourquoi nous proposons un large éventail de programmes de formation et de développement en IA, conçus pour habiliter les entreprises de toutes tailles. Nos formations vont des bases de l'IA jusqu'aux cours avancés, permettant à chaque membre de l'entreprise, quel que soit son niveau de compétence, de maîtriser les outils et les concepts de l'IA.

Nos services ne se limitent pas à l'automatisation et aux analyses de données. Nous nous engageons à éduquer nos clients sur les meilleures pratiques en IA, en offrant des sessions de formation personnalisées, des webinaires interactifs, et des ressources éducatives complètes. Ces programmes sont conçus pour aider les entreprises à naviguer dans le paysage en constante évolution de l'IA, à développer des stratégies efficaces et à prendre des décisions éclairées basées sur les données.

Chez Gepetia, nous combinons expertise académique et expérience pratique pour offrir des formations répondant à vos besoins. Fondée par trois futurs ingénieurs, bientôt diplômés et à la pointe des technologies d’intelligence artificielle.

Cette solide base théorique est essentielle pour comprendre les subtilités et les possibilités de l'IA. C’est de là que nous tirons notre légitimité à proposer des formations.

Découvrez comment Gepetia peut transformer votre entreprise avec nos solutions et nos programmes de formation en IA. Visitez notre site web pour plus d'informations, ou bien, contactez-nous pour discuter de vos besoins spécifiques en matière de formation en IA.

شركة أطلس لنظم المعلومات الجغرافية هي الموزع الوحيد والمعتمد لشركة Esri العالمية في العراق، الرائدة في تقنيات نظم المعلومات الجغرافية (GIS). تمتد خبرتنا لأكثر من 35 عامًا من النجاحات المستمرة والمشاريع الريادية في مختلف القطاعات الحكومية والخاصة.

نقدم مجموعة متكاملة من الخدمات تشمل:

تصميم وتنفيذ أنظمة GIS المتكاملة

التحليل المكاني والبياني

إدارة وتحليل الصور الفضائية

خدمات الاستشعار عن بعد (التحسس النائي)

بناء قواعد البيانات المكانية

التدريب والدعم الفني المعتمد

نعتمد في حلولنا على تقنيات Esri وشركائها التقنيين العالميين، مما يضمن تقديم حلول مبتكرة وفعالة تلبي احتياجات التخطيط الحضري، البنية التحتية، الأمن، الطاقة، الزراعة، والبيئة.

في أطلس، نؤمن بأن البيانات المكانية هي أساس التحول الرقمي واتخاذ القرار الذكي، ونفخر بكوننا جزءًا من بناء مستقبل أكثر استدامة وذكاء في العراق.

Atlas for Geographic Information Systems is the sole distributor of Esri in Iraq, with over 35 years of continuous success in delivering cutting-edge GIS solutions across the public and private sectors.

We offer a comprehensive suite of services, including:

Design and implementation of integrated GIS systems

Spatial and data analysis

Satellite imagery processing and analysis

Remote sensing (Earth observation)

Geodatabase development

Certified training and technical support

Our solutions are powered by Esri technologies and its global network of technical partners, enabling us to support projects in urban planning, infrastructure, security, energy, agriculture, and environmental management.

At Atlas, we believe that location intelligence is the foundation for smart decisions and sustainable digital transformation. We are proud to lead Iraq’s journey towards a smarter, spatially enabled future.

Name: Dorg Society
Description:
DORG Society is an Italian non-profit Foundation that operates as an ethical and regulatory governance body for the entire DORG ecosystem.
The Foundation actively promotes society's cultural evolution toward the responsible adoption of digital employees, working not only to ensure ethical implementation but also to accelerate the adoption of this innovation as a driver of sustainable and inclusive development.
Through its Ethics Committee and the community's digital consultation system, DORG Society develops and maintains a binding Code of Conduct for all ecosystem stakeholders, ensures compliance with the EU AI Act through independent audits, and provides guidelines for the ethical integration of DORGs in the workplace.
DORG Society collaborates with universities, research centers, and institutions to develop international ethical and regulatory standards, positioning itself as a reference point for technological innovation that respects human dignity, workers' rights, and environmental sustainability in the field of artificial intelligence applied to the world of work.

Cyber Security Education Denmark (CSED) arbejder med en vision om at gøre uddannelse og kompetenceudvikling i IT-sikkerhed tilgængeligt for alle, uanset om man har en baggrund i IT eller ej. 

Cybersikkerhedsbranchen er i rivende udvikling med karrieremuligheder, der varierer fra teknisk IT-sikkerhedssupport til salg, markedsføring, undervisning og træning.
 
CSED tilbyder kurser og træning, bootcamps og webinarer i en kombination af  online/teams/fysisk fremmøde baseret dels på brugerbetaling, dels på sponsorerede events.
 
Via vores partnerskaber med nogle af verdens største udbydere af såvel IT-sikkerhedsuddannelser som awareness træning af medarbejdere, tilbyder vi virksomheder, organisationer og deres medarbejdere et unikt udbud af kurser og IT-sikkerhedsuddannelser.

Vores forløb og kurser fokuserer dels på en teknisk tilgang til IT-sikkerhed, men også IT-sikkerhed i relation til projektledelse, HR, undervisning, markedsføring og etik.

En række af vores bootcamp forløb er særligt målrettet unge som, f.eks. grundet deres beskæftigelse indenfor sport eller militæret, har særlige kvalifikationer som er efterspurgte inden for IT-sikkerhed og hvor en karriere i IT-sikkerhed kunne være en fremtidig karrierevej.

Et forløb på CSED giver de studerende mulighed for at kombinere job, sport med sideløbende uddannelse og kompetenceudvikling.

CSED samarbejder med organisationer og foreninger, der også har fokus på IT-sikkerhed og kompetenceudvikling.

Name: CTF Factory, Inc.
Description:
Our core mission is to support the community, providing education and hands-on training to all, for free, in venues such as the BSides community and beyond with our Pros vs Joes Capture the Flag event.

Capture the Flag (CTF)
Training and Experimentation
A Dynamic, Real-World-Focused Simulation

We design, build, and host CTF games for cyber security conferences and public, private, and charitable organizations, providing experience in defensive and offensive cyber security.

Our mission is simple:  Provide training that is free to participants, primarily through events like BSides, and release under Open Source and Development Licenses for other groups to do the same.  

Our hosted game dynamics are modeled after many years of actual game play and real world situations involving advanced adversary activity.  Originally loosely based on the National Collegiate Cyber Defense Competition (CCDC), we strive to continue to develop our simulation to improve the experience and realism so players learn while keeping the game fun and exciting from beginning to end.

CTF Factory was formed from the small group of cyber security professionals who run Pros vs Joes (PvJ) CTF and has been running competitions since 2012. It remains intertwined with that group, supporting all of their events. It has executed events at BSides Las Vegas, BSides DC, BSides Delaware, BsidesIndy, BSides Salt Lake, Hack West, Infosecworld, and other private games in various venues.

CTF Factory was incorporated as a charitable, non-profit 501(c)(3) company to give-back to the Infosec communities. Our key hope is to build and maintain infrastructure and expertise for BSides and other events.  We want to support these efforts with individual donation programs, challenge coins and other swag, as well as donations and support from sponsors.

Name: Kunstmann Consulting ApS
Description:
Hos Kunstmann Consulting ApS har vi specialiseret os i rådgivning i brugen af særligt FI og CO modulerne af SAP (både R3 og S/4HANA), men også naturligt de øvrige moduler som MM, PP, IM/WH samt SD, der spiller sammen med både FI og CO. Vi har særligt omfattende kompetencer indenfor product costing og alt det setup der skal til at have godt styr på den proces i både mindre og større virksomheder. Vi har samlet 25 års erfaring i arbejdet med SAP og over 15 år af disse er der arbejdet intensivt med optimal opsætning af SAP for en større dansk industrivirksomhed.
Vi har også kompetencer indenfor procesoptimering i det hele taget, så vi begrænser os ikke nødvendigvis kun til systemet, men finder også proces forbedring der kan medføre bedre udnyttelse af ERP systemet.
Udover SAP, så kan vi også arbejde med kunder der har andre ERP systemer, som f.eks. Microsofts Navision, Business Central eller Finance & Opereations, og sandsynligvis også helt andre ERP systemer. Vi plejer at være gode til hurtigt at sætte os ind i hvordan et ERP system fungerer ud fra vores lange erfaring omkring ERP  og sammenspil med processer i det hele taget.

Name: EDATRON Solutions GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei EDATRON Solutions GmbH! Wir sind Ihr Experte für Elektronik- und PCB-Designlösungen. Unsere Leidenschaft gilt der Welt des Altium Designers, und wir bieten eine breite Palette von Dienstleistungen an, um Ihre elektronischen Visionen Wirklichkeit werden zu lassen.

Unsere Expertise gründet sich auf langjährige Erfahrung im Elektronik- und PCB-Design. Unser Gründer, Sven Ingelfinger, arbeitet als Hardware-Entwickler bei IDS – Imaging Development Systems GmbH, wo er zahlreiche Schaltungsdesigns und PCB-Layouts für industrielle Kamerasysteme entwickelte. Darüber hinaus lag ein Schwerpunkt in der Betreuung und im Ausbau der EDA-Tools Altium Designer, Altium Vault, Altium Concord Pro und Altium Enterprise. Mit dieser Expertise bieten wir heute Schulungs- und Beratungsdienstleistungen Rund um die Produkte von Altium an.

Altium Designer Trainings: Unsere Altium Designer Trainings sind auf professionelle Entwickler zugeschnitten, die ihre Fähigkeiten im PCB-Design verbessern möchten. Egal, ob Sie Einsteiger, Umsteiger oder erfahrener Nutzer sind, unsere Kurse bieten umfassende Einblicke in den Altium Designer. Von der Konfiguration der Software über die Schaltplanerstellung bis hin zur Optimierung von PCB-Layouts – wir decken alle wichtigen Aspekte ab.

Individuelle Schulungen: Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte In-House und Online-Trainings für alle Altium Produkte an. Unsere Experten arbeiten eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um einen Schulungsplan zu erstellen, der Ihren individuellen Anforderungen gerecht wird.

Description:
Na Rastshop, sabemos que você quer ser um empresário de rastreamento e telemetria que não apenas sobrevive, mas prospera em um mercado cada vez mais competitivo.

Para fazer isso, você precisa de um parceiro que te ajude a tomar decisões estratégicas, garantindo que cada dispositivo adquirido seja um passo para fortalecer seu negócio e oferecer um serviço diferenciado.

O problema é que muitos prestadores de serviço acabam competindo apenas por preço e ficando presos em um modelo insustentável. A falta de conhecimento técnico e suporte adequado leva a escolhas erradas de dispositivos, contratos perdidos e a uma constante dúvida: continuo investindo para crescer ou desisto e faço outra coisa da vida?

Acreditamos que o verdadeiro crescimento vem da entrega de valor real, e não da venda do rastreador mais barato. Quem aprende a escolher as soluções certas consegue sair da guerra de preços, aumentar seu ticket médio e se destacar no mercado.

Pois, entendemos que não é fácil tomar decisões quando o futuro do seu negócio está em jogo. Sabemos que cada escolha errada pode custar clientes e contratos valiosos.

É por isso que a Rastshop se posiciona como seu parceiro estratégico, oferecendo não apenas dispositivos, mas consultoria técnica especializada, um portfólio confiável e suporte contínuo, garantindo que você tenha as ferramentas certas para crescer e se diferenciar.

Com mais de 500.000 dispositivos distribuídos, presença em quatro segmentos de mercado e suporte técnico de ponta, ajudamos prestadores de serviço a transformar rastreamento em um serviço premium, altamente valorizado pelos clientes.

Name: Sandbodarna IT AB
Description:
Sandbodarna IT AB är Teams Nordic första partner i Sverige.

Vi kommer tillsammans med Teams Nordic utbilda i hur man jobbar effektivare i Microsoft 365s programsvit. Alltför ofta utgår utbildningar i de här applikationerna ifrån en hel massa funktioner och vilken knapp som gör vad. När vi utbildar i Teams Nordics koncept utgår vi främst ifrån hur de olika applikationerna samarbetar, vad du gör vad och hur du uppnår ett bra arbetssätt. Vi sätter förståelsen för helheten i första rummet. 

Efter pandemin har vi en ganska stor utbildningsskuld på många arbetsplatser. Många har använt Microsoft Teams som ett sätt att lösa pandemin. Man har inte insett vilket fantastiskt verktyg man har köpt. Vi hjälper er mer än gärna att lotsa in personalen i Microsoft 365 och utnyttja alla applikationerna för att få full funktionalitet. Med en bra pedagogisk utbildning kan din personal spara flera arbetstimmar per dag, för att inte tala om hur mycket bättre de mår när osäkerhet övergår till självsäkerhet.
Utöver vårt Teams Nordic utbildningspaket erbjuder vi utbildningar i alla Microsoft 365 applikationerna. Vår utbildare är certifierad Microsoft Office Specialist-Expert. Att anlita en behörig erfaren lärare i matematik som därtill är Microsoft Excel expert har visat sig vara framgångsrikt.

Vi hör inte till någon större kedja utan kan gärna anpassa våra utbildningar efter dig som kund. Att nivåanpassa är viktigt och självklart.

Ser referência na transformação digital, capacitando empresas e indivíduos a atingirem seu potencial máximo através do uso inteligente de dados e tecnologia.

Capacitar empresas e profissionais a tomar decisões baseadas em dados, promovendo a inovação e a eficiência através de soluções tecnológicas avançadas e educação de qualidade. Inovação: Buscamos constantemente novas maneiras de resolver problemas e melhorar processos.
Excelência: Comprometemo-nos a entregar serviços e cursos de alta qualidade.
Impacto Social: Trabalhamos para criar oportunidades de desenvolvimento e transformação na sociedade brasileira.
Transparência: Valorizamos a honestidade e a clareza em todas as nossas interações.

Business Intelligence: Desenvolvimento de soluções para análise de dados e geração de insights estratégicos.

Na Data Mastery Tech, estamos comprometidos com a excelência e a inovação, buscando transformar o cenário tecnológico e educacional do Brasil. Junte-se a nós nessa  jornada de crescimento e transformação digital.

Name: SIGMA
Description:
Wdrażamy technologie, które mają sens. Pomagamy jednostkom samorządu terytorialnego, szpitalom i innym podmiotom publicznym skutecznie planować, realizować i rozliczać projekty IT – od analizy po ostatni protokół odbioru.

Nasze podejście to połączenie eksperckiej wiedzy, zrozumienia przepisów i codziennego wsparcia, które daje spokój w każdym etapie realizacji projektu.

 Co możemy dla Ciebie zrobić?

 Przeprowadzimy audyt potrzeb i stanu infrastruktury IT
 Opracujemy pełną dokumentację projektową (OPZ, SWZ, strategia, formularz wniosku)
 Wesprzemy w procesie pozyskania i rozliczenia dofinansowania
 Zadbamy o zgodność projektu z przepisami (KSC, NIS2, KRI, RODO)
 Pomożemy w obsłudze przetargu – od publikacji po analizę ofert
 Koordynujemy dostawy, wdrożenia, testy i przekazania – tak, by nic nie umknęło
 Wspieramy wdrażanie Systemów Zarządzania Bezpieczeństwem Informacji (SZBI)
 Jesteśmy obecni na każdym etapie – telefon, spotkanie, raport – kiedy tylko potrzebujesz

 Współpracujemy z ponad 200 gminami i powiatami oraz 60 szpitalami.
Nie obiecujemy „kompleksowej obsługi” – dajemy Ci pewność, że wszystko będzie zrealizowane jak należy.

Name: Karva Technologies
Description:
Karva Placer is a common portal designed to bridge the gap between students, college placement officers, and company recruiters. It provides a centralized platform with specialized features for each user group to streamline the campus recruitment and placement process.

For students, it offers tools to enhance their employability, such as an AI-powered resume builder with an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) score, mock interview sessions, and detailed feedback reports to help them prepare for job applications and interviews.

For placement officers, the portal provides tools for managing student data, simplifying the shortlisting of candidates based on recruiter requirements, and staying updated on new placement and internship opportunities. It also allows them to publish and manage campus events.

For recruiters, Karva Placer serves as a platform for efficient hiring. It allows them to post an unlimited number of jobs and events, directly connect with colleges and students, use mock interview scores to find the most prepared candidates, and partner on mass recruitment campus drives. The platform offers free event publishing, helping companies promote their brand to a wide student audience.

Name: SYSPRO User Group UK
Description:
A message from SYSPRO User Group UK’s founder, Sarah Adamo:
Anyone who knows me will know that I am both an ardent fan of SYSPRO and strongly believe in the power of collaboration and knowledge sharing. 
I have therefore combined these two passions and established an online SYSPRO User Group for SYSPRO users in the UK.
The primary goal of the SYSPRO User group UK is to facilitate open discussions, encourage problem-solving, and share valuable insights related to SYSPRO usage in our daily operations. Whether you are a seasoned expert or just starting your journey with the software, this forum will provide an inclusive space for everyone to contribute and learn from each other's experiences.
To join us, simply visit suguk.co.uk and create an account on the forum page using your email address. Please take a moment to introduce yourself and explore the discussions already taking place. Remember, this forum will thrive through our active participation and engagement, so feel free to start new discussions, ask questions, and share your thoughts.  
Additionally, I encourage you to spread the word about this community among your teams and colleagues who may benefit from being a part of the SYSPRO User Group UK. The more diverse our membership, the greater the value we can collectively derive from this platform. Don’t forget to follow us on YouTube and LinkedIn too!
I am truly excited about this initiative and genuinely believe that by coming together, we can enhance our knowledge, strengthen our skills, and ultimately contribute to our mutual success.
If you have any questions or suggestions regarding the SYSPRO User Group UK, please do not hesitate to reach out to me. I look forward to connecting with all of you in this new virtual space and witnessing the positive impact it can have on our professional journeys.
 In the words of the African Proverb - If you want to go fast, go alone; if you want to go far, go together.
I look forward to “going together” with you!
Sarah

Zapraszamy Cię do świata, gdzie bezpieczeństwo w sieci stanie się Twoim priorytetem.

 Dlatego naszą misją jest propagowanie treści dobranych i przeformułowanych w taki sposób, aby docierały do jak największego grona odbiorców.

Nasze sesje są pełne praktycznych porad i wskazówek, które dzięki usystematyzowaniu wprowadzają dobre nawyki do codziennego życia. To pozwala uchronić przed wieloma nieprzyjemnymi i stresującymi sytuacjami.
Pamiętaj, że w dzisiejszym, zdigitalizowanym świecie warto tworzyć solidne fundamenty cyfrowej tożsamości.

Description:
The PNW Cyber Challenge Games was formed to run the Pacific Rim Collegiate Cyber Defense Competition (PRCCDC). It was hosted for many years at Highline College until the pandemic. The Pacific Rim Collegiate Cyber Defense Competition is the regional qualifier (WA, OR, and ID) for the National CCDC. Now entering its 19th year, we look forward to having fun as always and most importantly, getting our students jobs.

PRCCDC is a three-day event. This year it will be held on March 21st, 22nd and 23rd. Friday and Saturday are a Red Team/ Blue Team competition with the individual schools protecting a fictitious virtual network from the Red Team. On Sunday, there is a Job Fair for students to talk with sponsors. Note that all sponsors can receive digital versions of the students resumes before the event to review.

Nazywam się Pat i jestem nauczycielem z ponad 13-letnim doświadczeniem. Z wykształcenia jestem polonistą, jednak to Excel jest moją pasją!

 

Zapraszam Cię na moje szkolenia z Excela, podczas których poznasz tajniki tego fantastycznego programu. Nauczę Cię używania formuł, odkryję skróty klawiszowe, wskażę jak efektywnie korzystać z tabel przestawnych oraz jak tworzyć i edytować listy rozwijane. Excel to narzędzie, które uwielbiam i chciałbym podzielić się tą pasją z Tobą! 

Ponadto prowadzę korepetycje z języka polskiego, które są skierowane do uczniów, którzy mają specyficzne trudności w uczeniu się, takie jak dysleksja, ADHD czy wysoko funkcjonujące spektrum autyzmu. Pomagam w codziennych zmaganiach szkolnych i przygotowuję do testów czy matury.

W mojej pracy stawiam na indywidualne podejście do każdego kursanta, dostosowując metody i materiały do ich potrzeb. Wiem, jak ważne jest budowanie zaufania i zapewnienie bezpiecznej przestrzeni, w której każdy może swobodnie rozwijać swoje umiejętności.

Name: Denim World 4u
Description:
Denim is a durable cotton twill fabric that is often used to make jeans, jackets, and other clothing items. It has a distinct diagonal ribbing pattern that is created by weaving one colored thread (the warp) with an undyed thread (the weft). The most common color of denim is indigo blue, but it can also be found in a variety of other colors and washes.

Denim fabric has a rich history, originating in the city of Nîmes, France, and deriving its name from the French term "serge de Nîmes." It gained popularity in the United States during the 19th century and became synonymous with sturdy workwear due to its durability. Over the years, denim has evolved from utilitarian work clothing to a fashion staple, and it's now worn in various styles and forms worldwide.
Key characteristics of denim include its strength, comfort, and ability to develop a unique and personalized appearance over time as it fades and distresses with wear. Different types of denim finishes, such as stone washing, acid washing, and sandblasting, have been developed to create a range of textures and looks.

Denim is widely used not only in jeans and jackets but also in skirts, shorts, shirts, and various accessories. It has also been adopted into high-fashion and designer collections. Denim's versatility, durability, and timeless appeal have contributed to its enduring popularity in the world of fashion.

Name: ITOiP
Description:
IT OiP je kompanija koja se bavi obukom i usavršavanjem svih onih koji žele da postanu IT stručnjaci, kao i njihovim zapošljavanjem.

Srbija se iz godine u godinu suočava sa problemom odlaska velikog broja mladih ljudi koji je u potrazi za poslom napuštaju, dok veliki broj dobro plaćenih radnih mesta u oblasti informacionih tehnologija ostaje upražnjen. Uvidevši ovaj problem, grupa stručnjaka se okupila oko ideje IT Obuka i Posao, u cilju dodatnog podsticanja velikog broja mladih ljudi da se zaposle i ostanu u svojoj zemlji.

Proučavajući najveće nedostatke u stvaranju stručnjaka kroz proces formalnog obrazovanja kao i potražnje za određenim zanimanjima, osmislili smo programe koji će našim polaznicima, na najefikasniji i najoptimalniji način, omogućiti da se razviju u stručnjake iz više različitih IT oblasti.Procenjuje se da danas Srbiji nedostaje oko 30.000 IT stručnjaka i taj se broj, sa razvojem informacionih tehnologija, povećava iz dana u dan.

Name: IoT Hessen Group (Frankfurt & Kassel)
Description:
IoT Hessen, 2015 gegründet, ist das erste IoT Meetup in Frankfurt. Es steht allen offen, die an der Entwicklung des Internet of Things teilhaben wollen – als Teilnehmer:in, Beobachter:in oder teilnehmende Beobachter:in. In regelmäßigen Abendveranstaltungen möchten wir diesen neuen, spannenden Industriezweig gemeinsam und interdisziplinär erkunden – in Form von Vorträgen, Hackathons, Diskussionsrunden und mehr.
Hype, Wirtschaftsmotor, Innovationstreiber, technische Spielerei: Das Internet of Things (IoT) bedeutet für jeden etwas anderes. Aber wir alle beobachten die zunehmende Verbreitung vernetzter, intelligenter Geräte und Alltagsgegenstände in unserem Umfeld. Seit Kevin Ashton den Begriff „Internet of Things“ 1999 prägte, wird aus der einstigen Utopie, dass Computer, Sensoren und Aktoren selbständig Daten austauschen und einander steuern können, Stück für Stück Realität. Auch die Konjunktur verwandter Begriffe wie Industrie 4.0, M2M oder Internet of Everything spricht dafür. So entdecken viele Traditionsunternehmen im IoT einen Jungbrunnen, während sich junge Startups zu innovativen Geschäftsideen inspirieren lassen.

Name: Ipaja Tech Lab
Description:
Bridging the Gap to Technological enhancements, reducing poverty and unemployment and creating empowerment to the youths.

Nigeria, the most populous black nation, is home to around 200 million people with an annual population growth of 2.61 percent. Currently, over 33.6 million (16.8 percent) Nigerians are regarded as youths (aged between 15 and 35). However, according to statistics, about 43.69 percent of Nigeria’s total population were aged 0 to 14 in 2019. This means that in the near future, the youth will increasingly form the bulk of the country’s population as children grow older into young adults.

As part of our Corporate Social Responsibility, and taking advantage of the large pool of young and unemployed youths in Nigeria, we would like to set up  internet libraries / software development academies that would train teenagers and youth in the art of software engineering, machine learning, Blockchain technology and Artificial Intelligence. We believe these technologies will be goal drivers for change bringing in lasting development to our local economy, country, world and most importantly to the participant.

This will also largely be possible because of the low barrier to entry in the tech ecosystem. Currently, we train young teenagers the art of software development with emphasis on Web development, this most times serves as a launching pad for easy entry for participants. Expansion to further technologies like Machine learning, Artificial Intelligence, Mobile App development and Blockchain will follow. 

We would start at our locality and reach out to a minimum set of 50 teenagers and youth per enrollment cycle. From the enrollment cycle to training completion will last 3 months. This number of enrollees will increase as we have capacity. We would orientate and sensitive them regarding these (Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, Mobile App development, Machine Learning, Web development) and the major roles they play in crafting our collective future.

3D interactive models: Rotate, explode, and highlight components in context—no manuals required.
AI diagnostics: Symptom intake to probability-ranked causes and proven fix paths.

Verify and log: Post-fix tests, digital sign-offs, and exportable audit trails.
Built for the field: Offline guidance, torque specs, part locations, and safety notes on mobile.
Integrations: Zendesk, ServiceNow, Salesforce, plus SSO.

Cut MTTR by up to 40% with guided 3D fixes.

Standardize service quality across models, teams, and geographies.

Name: Corporate BI - Business Intelligence Training
Description:
Corporate BI training courses emerged from a simple observation: while online tutorials and documentation existed, there was a significant gap in quality, hands-on Power BI training across Australia.

We recognised that the most effective learning happens through direct interaction, immediate feedback, and collaborative problem-solving. That's why we committed to face-to-face training from day one. Many training entities try to fit far too much information into a few hours. The measure of value is the quality of outcome not the quantity of course material. Corporate BI training uses hands-on examples for students to try and learn by experience and not by hundreds of PowerPoint slides.

We train tomorrow's data heroes across the capital cities, online and via bespoke on site corporate visits, helping them advance their careers and transform their organisations' data capabilities.

Name: BEDiGIT (Building European Digital Inclusion and Trust)
Description:
About the project
The Building European Digital Inclusion and Trust (BEDIGIT) project, co-funded by the Erasmus+ Programme of the European Union (Project #: 2023-2-ES01-KA210-VET-00018100 – BEDIGIT), has been designed to bridge the digital divide and enhance digital trust and sustainability across Europe. 
While digital technologies continue to rapidly transform the way we learn, work, and engage within our society, disparities in access to digital tools, digital literacy, and trust in online systems remain significant barriers. BEDIGIT seeks to address these issues by equipping individuals with the skills and knowledge necessary to navigate digital environments confidently and responsibly.
Through a combination of activities that focus on research and training, the project will advance equitable access to digital tools, fostering sustainable digital practices, and promoting cybersecurity and digital trust. By working with key stakeholders, including educators, trainers and professionals, BEDIGIT aims to empower individuals and organizations with the resources required to actively participate in the digital world while upholding the European values of inclusivity, sustainability, and trust.
Consortium partners:
1. Foundation of the University of Burgos (Spain) – Project Coordinator
The Foundation of the University of Burgos (FUBU) is an institution dedicated to fostering innovation and research in education and technology,
2. ISACA Europe (Ireland) 
ISACA Europe is a global leader in cybersecurity, IT governance, and risk management,
3. Vernian RTI (Cyprus) 
Vernian RTI specialises in ICT, digital transformation, cybersecurity, project management, training and strategic management. 
Aim:
By leveraging cross-border collaboration and the expertise of the participating consortium partners from Spain, Cyprus and Ireland, the project aspires to drive systemic change, ensuring that digital education and sustainability efforts reach all communities.

더 나은 프로그래머가 되기 위해 끊임없이 질문하고 탐구하며, 이것이 성장과 발전의 핵심이 됩니다.

여정은 항상 진화하고 변화하는 것입니다.

함께 문제를 해결하고 서로의 아이디어를 나눔으로써 더 나은 결과를 얻고,

우리는 이것이 한 번으로 끝나는'과정'이 아닌 지속적인 '여정'이라고 이야기합니다.
코딩은 끊임없이 발전하고 변화하기에, 지속적인 열정과 학습 의지가 필요합니다.
Codyssey에서 동료들과 문제에 몰입하고 답을 찾아가기를,

Consultoria e assessoria SST: elaboração de PGR, PCMSO, LTCAT, PPP, AET, regularização documental, apoio no eSocial e projetos de acessibilidade.

Consultoria ambiental e perícia técnica: soluções completas que ampliam a segurança, sustentabilidade e conformidade da sua empresa.

Com mais de 30.000 colaboradores capacitados e presença em diversos estados, a ECOSEG é referência em oferecer soluções inteligentes, seguras e eficazes para empresas de todos os portes e segmentos.

Nosso compromisso é cuidar de pessoas, proteger negócios e impulsionar resultados.

Nous offrons des services variés incluant :

1- Formation académique : Interventions dans des établissements d'enseignement supérieur pour des cours sur le développement logiciel, les systèmes d'information, la gestion de projet, et les dernières tendances technologiques.

Formation professionnelle : Séminaires et bootcamps immersifs pour renforcer l'esprit d'analyse, les compétences en SI, et la capacité à travailler en mode projet.

4- Conférences thématiques : Organisation de conférences sur divers sujets technologiques pour maintenir les étudiants et professionnels informés des dernières avancées et tendances du secteur.
Chez InfoEdu Experts, nous croyons en une approche pédagogique qui combine théorie et pratique, favorisant l'apprentissage par l'expérience. Nous nous engageons à maintenir nos programmes à jour avec les dernières tendances du marché pour offrir une formation actuelle et pertinente.

Nous sommes dédiés à préparer la prochaine génération de professionnels de l'informatique, en leur fournissant les outils nécessaires pour réussir dans leurs carrières.

Pour plus d'informations ou pour collaborer avec nous, contactez-nous.

Name: CFCamp
Description:
CFCamp has been created as a grassroots initiative to provide training and networking opportunities for beginner and advanced level CFML, web and mobile software engineers. The conference was launched in 2008 as a single-day event with less than 100 attendees and 9 sessions.

 
Since then the event has continued to grow year-by-year in attendees and number of sessions. In the mid-2010s a pre-conference workshop day was added to the event, which has been adopted for providing half- or full-day commercial training offerings very successfully.


CFCamp now comprises two full days of main conference on Thursday and Friday and with the preceding days used for commercial workshops and training - as well as free community events. 

Some of the growth milestones were:

2008: single-day - 80 attendees and 9 sessions
2011: single-day - 120 attendees and 10+ sessions
2017: two days - 160 attendees and 20+ sessions and workshop day
2018: two days - 180 attendees and 25 sessions and multiple workshop day
2019: two days - 200+ attendees and 25+ sessions and multiple workshop day
2023: Back from a Covid-19-enforced break - two day with ~ 200 attendees, 25+ sessions and a workshop day
2024: two days - 150+ attendees and 25+ sessions and multiple workshop day

For 2025 we have a new venue hosting CFCamp, the Atomis Hotel Munich Airport in Oberding. It’s a very convenient location with its proximity to the airport and hotel rooms for attendees on-site.

This year we are expecting 150+ attendees due to a heightened demand for community meetings after multiple years of hibernation and a widened focus of the conference and expanded content coverage to CFML-related topics like cloud infrastructure and mobile development in the context of CFML as a technology stack.

Somos pioneiros em Ribeirão Preto no gerenciamento hídrico por telemetria, com mais de 23 anos de experiência em inovação e segurança eletrônica. Especializamo-nos em oferecer soluções completas que revolucionam a gestão de recursos hídricos, proporcionando eficiência, economia e sustentabilidade para hotéis, condomínios e empresas de diversos segmentos.

A telemetria hídrica utiliza sensores avançados instalados em reservatórios para monitorar o volume de água 24 horas por dia. Com um aplicativo intuitivo, os usuários têm acesso a informações detalhadas e visuais, desde diagnósticos precisos de vazamentos até alerta que evitam a falta de água. Essa tecnologia transforma a maneira como recursos hídricos são gerenciados, facilitando decisões estratégicas e prevenindo desperdícios.

Nossos serviços vão além do monitoramento. Oferecemos um pacote completo que inclui equipamentos, instalação, ajustes técnicos e substituições em caso de defeitos de fábrica, além de acesso à plataforma de monitoramento e assistência técnica sem custos adicionais. Tudo isso para garantir tranquilidade e eficiência aos nossos clientes.

Com uma abordagem proativa, prevenimos problemas antes que eles aconteçam, identificamos vazamentos rapidamente e simplificamos a gestão hídrica por meio de tecnologia acessível e intuitiva. Nosso diferencial está na entrega de soluções integradas e personalizadas que agregam valor real aos negócios dos nossos clientes.

Gratech Telemetria: monitoramento preciso para uma gestão eficiente e econômica. Transforme sua relação com água, gás e energia com tecnologia de ponta!

Après une tentative manquée en 2024 en raison d’un manque de préparation structurée, notre club s’engage à transformer cette expérience en une force collective pour atteindre des résultats exceptionnels.

Nous offrons un cadre rigoureux et collaboratif incluant des entraînements hebdomadaires sur des plateformes reconnues (Codeforces, LeetCode, CSES), des compétitions inter-écoles, et des ateliers mentorés centrés sur l’optimisation d’algorithmes, les structures de données avancées et les stratégies de résolution de problèmes. Notre communauté vise à former des équipes soudées capables de relever les défis techniques les plus exigeants, tout en développant des compétences transférables aux carrières en ingénierie logicielle et en recherche informatique.

Le club s’adresse aux étudiants motivés, qu’ils soient débutants ou expérimentés, désireux de progresser dans un environnement exigeant et solidaire. En parallèle de la préparation à l’ICPC, nous facilitons les échanges avec des professionnels du secteur et organisons des simulations d’entretiens techniques pour préparer nos membres aux attentes des entreprises technologiques de premier plan.

Rejoignez-nous pour :

Bénéficier d’un programme structuré aligné sur les standards internationaux de l’ICPC.
Intégrer un réseau actif d’étudiants passionnés par l’algorithmique et l’innovation.
Accéder à des ressources pédagogiques exclusives et à des partenariats stratégiques.

Name: Md Masudar Rahman
Description:
Digital marketing refers to the use of digital channels, platforms, and technologies to promote products, services, or brands to a target audience. It encompasses a wide range of online strategies and tactics aimed at reaching and engaging potential customers through various digital mediums. Digital marketing has become increasingly important in today's interconnected world, where people spend a significant amount of time online.

Here are some key components and strategies within digital marketing Search Engine Optimization (SEO): This involves optimizing your website and its content to rank higher in search engine results pages (SERPs). The goal is to increase organic (non-paid) traffic to your website.

Search Engine Marketing (SEM): SEM involves both SEO and paid search advertising, often referred to as pay-per-click (PPC) advertising. Google Ads is a common platform for PPC advertising.

Social Media Marketing: This involves using social media platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and others to connect with and engage your target audience. It includes both organic (unpaid) posting and paid advertising.

Name: Flowlighn Consulting
Description:
Flowlighn Consulting designs behavioral execution architecture for service desks, MSPs, and call center environments where execution control determines margin, client retention, and delivery risk. We deliver execution control as managed operational architecture, not consulting.

Most support organizations carry hidden structural risk. Training that does not enforce behavior. Metrics that report activity instead of controlling performance. Processes that rely on individual discretion rather than engineered reliability. Growth, turnover, and tool complexity compound drift. Leadership compensates through oversight and escalation. The system remains unchanged.

Flowlighn corrects this at design level. Our proprietary Operational Drift Index diagnostic maps the gap between training intent, floor behavior, and outcome variance. We then design behavioral training systems, performance enforcement frameworks, and behavior-locked workflow structures that make correct execution repeatable under pressure.

The result is reduced heroic variance, lower attrition, tighter client experience, and leadership teams released from constant intervention.

Services include Operational Drift Index diagnostics, training architecture design, KPI enforcement systems, behavior-locked workflow engineering, and internal enablement. Engagements begin with diagnostic mapping followed by targeted architecture deployment and leadership transfer.

We work with MSPs, IT service desks, BPO and outsourced support organizations, and customer operations leaders who require execution control built into their operating model.

Flowlighn replaces heroic variance with engineered execution.

Name: Chatofy
Description:
As businesses continue to grow and expand their online presence, it’s becoming increasingly important to offer exceptional customer service. One way to do this is by implementing a live chat support system on your website. Chatofy is a company that specializes in providing businesses with 24/7 live chat support, helping them to grow and succeed.

What is Chatofy?
Chatofy is a live chat support website that offers businesses access to a team of trained staff members who are available 24/7 to answer customer inquiries, address concerns, and provide support. With Chatofy, businesses can provide their customers with a seamless, hassle-free experience, all while freeing up their own time to focus on other important tasks.

How does Chatofy work?
Chatofy is designed to be easy to use and integrate into any business website. Once you sign up for the service, Chatofy will provide you with a code snippet that you can add to your website. This code will create a chat widget on your website that customers can use to initiate a chat session with a Chatofy staff member.

 

Once a chat session is initiated, the Chatofy staff member will work with the customer to address their needs and concerns. They can answer questions, provide technical support, and even help customers complete transactions on your website. The Chatofy staff is available 24/7, so customers can get the help they need at any time of the day or night.

What are the benefits of using Chatofy?
There are many benefits to using Chatofy for your business. First and foremost, it can help you provide exceptional customer service. Customers appreciate being able to get their questions answered quickly and easily, and having access to a 24/7 live chat support system can make a big difference in their overall experience with your business.

In addition to improving customer service, Chatofy can also help you increase sales and revenue.

Basée dans le Sud-Vendée, La communication d’aujourd’hui est une micro-agence indépendante qui accompagne les artisans, TPE, indépendants et petites structures dans leur communication digitale, avec une approche humaine, claire et sur-mesure.

 Ce que je propose :

Création de sites internet sur WordPress, avec le constructeur visuel Divi : responsive, rapide, esthétique et facile à prendre en main

Refonte de sites existants, avec une optimisation SEO locale pour gagner en visibilité sur Google

Conseil personnalisé en communication : stratégie, positionnement, identité visuelle, storytelling

Mise en place d’automatismes et d’outils IA pour gagner en efficacité dans l’organisation quotidienne (spécialement utile pour les profils neuroatypiques ou TDAH)

Pas de jargon. Pas de solutions toutes faites. Juste de l’écoute, de la pédagogie, de la créativité… et beaucoup de bienveillance. Je travaille main dans la main avec mes clients pour créer des outils qui leur ressemblent vraiment.

 Une communication simple, efficace et alignée avec vos valeurs, c’est possible.

 Installée à Saint-Gemme-la-Plaine (85), j’interviens à distance partout en France… et avec le sourire !

Sprint Future Amed Community
미래를 향해 달려가는 모든 이들을 위한 ‘스팩 SFAC’

[Sprint]
"짧은 기간 집중적으로 학습해 최상의 결과물을 만들어내는 학습 방법"
[Future]
"평등한 기회를 제공해 누구나 미래를 꿈꾸게 하는 양질의 교육"
[Aimed]
"미래의 꿈과 교육에 초점을 맞춘 프로그램으로 한 층 더 성장"
[Community]
"꾸준한 소통과 지속적인 관리를 통해 높은 수준의 지원을 제공"

‘스팩’은 누구에게나 미래를 꿈꾸게 합니다.
미래를 꿈꾸는 모두가 양질의 교육을 제공받을 수 있도록
스나이퍼팩토리에서는 최고의 교육과정만을 운영합니다.

‘스팩’이 추구하는 방향성: 기술과 혁신을 통해 미래지향적인 인재가 되도록
•협업지향적: 기술로 하나되어 다양한 협업을 만들어갑니다.
•미래지향적: 기술과 혁신을 거듭하며 미래를 설계합니다.
•도전적: 실패를 두려워하지 않고 끊임없이 도전합니다.

교육뿐만 아니라 미래에 대한 취업, 자소서, 포트폴리오 고민까지
‘스팩’은 교육생분들과 함께 고민하여 나아갑니다.

미래를 향한 질주 여정. ‘스팩’에 당신을 초대합니다.

A ideia do método nasceu da minha própria vivência.

O acúmulo digital é inevitável com o tempo. Entre arquivos, fotos, e-mails e projetos, percebi que tudo parecia sob controle, mas o digital se acumulava em silêncio, até virar um peso.

Foi quando entendi que manter a organização digital exigia mais do que boas intenções. Exigia um sistema.

Criei um método leve, funcional e adaptável à vida real.

E agora compartilho esse caminho com quem também sente que precisa recuperar o controle da própria rotina online com clareza e estrutura.

 Para quem tem acúmulo de arquivos, fotos, drive, e-mails e já não sabem por onde começar.

 Para quem busca clareza mental e mais tempo livre.

 Para quem quer um ponto de partida realista e possível de manter.

Name: Bloquei0
Description:
Criamos simulações de phishing que entregam métricas objetivas, que mostram a realidade. Sem elas, é impossível ter prova inegável de que as pessoas estão melhorando em identificar e relatar phishing e otimizar os treinamentos (mudar comportamento gastando menos dinheiro e tempo).

Aqui na Bloquei0, usamos o método provado da Phishbusters: 

1. Criamos uma linha de base científica, um ponto de partida objetivo.

Medimos com precisão o progresso das pessoas usando testes padronizados, ciência de dados e rigor científico. A aplicação de princípios científicos de pesquisa e análise de dados faz com que os resultados sejam comprováveis.

2. Com base na análise, segmentamos as pessoas em três grupos: (1) Imbatíveis, (2) Aprendizes e (3) Iniciantes.

Na teoria (e na prática), a maioria das falhas vem do terceiro grupo: os Iniciantes. São aquelas pessoas que falham a maioria (ou, até mesmo, todas) as simulações. Os Iniciantes geralmente representam 5-15% do grupo total e são responsáveis por 50% das falhas (ou mais).

Nesta fase, identificamos o problema e conseguimos gerar a maior economia de tempo, talentos e dinheiro.

3. Treinamos os Iniciantes de forma simples e direto ao ponto.

Usando o framework P.A.R.E. (baseado no HELP, desenvolvido por Cary Johnson), ensinamos quatro habilidades essenciais e à prova de falhas para se proteger de qualquer tipo de phishing, incluindo deepfakes.

RESULTADOS

→ Clareza: a análise de dados mostra exatamente onde está o problema principal; a partir dali, é bem mais fácil entender o que está dando certo e o que precisa mudar.

→ Interrupção mínima das operações: apenas 5-15% das pessoas precisam de sessões pontuais de treinamento; o resto pode focar no trabalho. Em pouco tempo, o Iniciantes se tornam Aprendizes e não precisarão mais de treinamento recorrente.

→ Economia incomparável: ~50% do risco é mitigado/eliminado com esforços concentrados e razoáveis, o que é muito mais econômico do que contratar uma plataforma de treinamentos

Et samarbejde med Clarify kan være tre ting:
 Undervisning i søgemaskineoptimering – så I forstår, hvad der virker (og hvorfor)
 Assistance til konkrete optimeringer – så jeres hjemmeside rent faktisk bliver fundet
 Vedligehold af websites – så indsatsen ikke forsvinder efter 3 måneder
Jeg tror på, at SEO skal være forståeligt og anvendeligt – ikke mystisk eller overvældende.

Vil I styrke jeres digitale tilstedeværelse organisk?
 Skriv en PB, book en samtale eller besøg Clarify.nu
 Jeg arbejder med virksomheder, der gerne vil forstå deres egen digitale synlighed – ikke bare outsource den og håbe på det bedste.

Fordi jeres website fortjener mere end "Vi fixede noget SEO engang i 2019".

Name: Ramzan Sheikh
Description:
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is a crucial digital marketing strategy aimed at improving the visibility and ranking of a website or online content within search engine results pages (SERPs). By optimizing various on-page and off-page elements, businesses and individuals can enhance their online presence, attract more organic (unpaid) traffic, and reach a wider audience.

Key Aspects of SEO:

    Keyword Research: Identifying relevant keywords and phrases that users might enter into search engines when looking for information related to your content. These keywords are strategically integrated into the content to signal its relevance to search engines.

    On-Page Optimization: This involves optimizing individual web pages to improve their visibility on search engines. It includes optimizing titles, meta descriptions, headings, content, and images with the chosen keywords.

    Content Quality: Creating high-quality, valuable, and relevant content that addresses users' queries and provides comprehensive information. Well-structured, engaging content tends to attract more visitors and encourages them to spend more time on your site.

    Technical SEO: Ensuring that the technical aspects of your website are optimized for search engines. This includes optimizing site speed, mobile-friendliness, site architecture, URL structure, and ensuring proper indexing and crawling by search engine bots.

    Backlinks: Building high-quality backlinks from authoritative websites to your own. Backlinks are seen as votes of confidence in your content's credibility and can significantly impact your search engine rankings.

    User Experience (UX): A positive user experience is essential for both visitors and search engines. A well-designed, easy-to-navigate website with fast load times can contribute to better rankings.

    Local SEO: For businesses targeting a specific geographic area, optimizing for local search is crucial. This includes setting up and optimizing Google My Bus

Name: Heximas Technologies
Description:
At Heximas Technologies Ltd, we specialize in delivering innovative software solutions tailored for agribusinesses, with a key focus on the horticultural export sector. We endeavor to transform agriculture through technology by empowering farmers, exporters, and milk cooperatives to operate more efficiently, transparently, and profitably.

We offer end-to-end Packhouse Management Systems dubbed Heximas Veg (horticultural vegetable packhouses), Heximas-Avo (Avocado packhouse management system) Heximas-Oil (Avocado Oil Packhouse Management System), Heximas Mango (fresh fruit processors), Heximas Nut (nut processors) and Heximas Crop, dedicated to seamless crop and farm management. Our platforms support everything from field data collection to packhouse processing ensuring traceability and compliance with global standards while minimizing losses and operational inefficiencies.

In addition to crop-focused solutions, we provide tailored systems for dairy farmers and cooperatives, enabling better herd management, milk collection tracking, and data-driven decision-making.

What sets us apart is our commitment to:
•	Automation of complex agribusiness workflows
•	Real-time training and responsive support
•	Custom-built systems tailored to each client’s unique operations
•	Robust traceability and control mechanisms that ensure accountability across the value chain

Whether you’re managing a large export operation or a smallholder cooperative, our goal is to simplify data management, enhance control, and help you scale intelligently and sustainably.

We have worked with packhouses in and out of Kenya, including Keitt Exporters Limited, Avodemia, The Flamingo Group, Sunripe (Vertical Agro), Persea Orchads, Vert Limited, Instaveg, Kenya Fresh Limited, Fresh Products EPZ, Orient Enterprises Limited, Exotic EPZ, Galaxy Dairy. 

For our Crop Management App, we are in partnership with Seed Pro Africa Ltd, Fadhili Africa etc.

Contact us any day anytime.

Name: MindHub Baia Mare
Description:
MindHub este primul club inovator de programare pentru copii cu vârste cuprinse între 6 și 18 ani.

În ziua de azi, putem spune fără ezitare că abilitățile digitale au devenit principala condiție pentru succesul în profesiile viitorului. De aceea, în cadrul cursurilor noastre, încurajam și ajutăm copiii să-și dezvolte gândirea logică și analitică, prin studiul fundamentelor programării. Lucrăm cu o programă originală, bazată pe proiecte care permit copiilor sa înceapă studiile la vârsta de 6 ani și să continue să acumuleze cunoștințe de programare până la vârsta de 18 ani. Uneltele pedagogice, instrumentele și jocurile de care ne folosim la cursuri sunt special gândite pentru a cultiva aptitudinile copiilor în domeniul programării și pentru a dezvolta o gândire polivalenta. Toate resursele MindHub au fost investite în crearea unor moduri de lucru interactive, potrivite pentru vârsta copiilor. Astfel, prin inovație constantă, a luat naștere un mediu în care copiii își pot lăsa imaginația să zburde și se pot remarca.

Name: BPx
Description:
BPx is a startup that is struggling to solve the communication problem, which is the biggest challenge in expanding the IT offshoring market.

Currently living in an era of digital transformation, the pace of change in the world is accelerating due to the remarkable development of AI. Rapid digital growth has resulted in the side effects of IT manpower shortage and rising labor costs, and the structure of the IT industry is also changing to resolve this.

It has become a common operating model for IT companies to operate core areas of the company with a small number of core human resources and outsource non-core areas. This outsourcing model is expanding to overseas offshoring due to rising costs and entry into global markets.

However, there are issues that must be resolved for the IT offshoring market to grow. This is “communication”.

Name: Pesqueros en IA
Description:
Pesqueros en IA es una comunidad de Ingenieros Pesqueros, científicos de datos, desarrolladores y profesionales del sector pesquero que están explorando y aplicando tecnologías de Inteligencia Artificial y Ciencia de Datos para resolver desafíos reales en la industria pesquera.

 NUESTRA MISIÓN

Democratizar el acceso al conocimiento en IA aplicada a la pesca, fomentando la colaboración entre profesionales del sector pesquero y tecnológico para impulsar la sustentabilidad, eficiencia y toma de decisiones basada en datos en la industria pesquera argentina y latinoamericana.

 QUÉ HACEMOS

- Desarrollamos herramientas open-source para análisis de datos pesqueros
- Creamos recursos educativos para aprender Data Science aplicado a pesca
- Facilitamos el acceso a datos abiertos del sector pesquero
- Promovemos la colaboración entre ingenieros pesqueros y tecnólogos
- Organizamos workshops y webinars sobre IA aplicada a la pesca

 ÁREAS DE TRABAJO

 Análisis de Datos Pesqueros | Estadísticas, tendencias y forecasting
 Análisis Geoespacial | Tracking de flotas y zonas de pesca
 Machine Learning | Predicción de capturas y clasificación de especies
 Visualización de Datos | Dashboards interactivos y reportes
 Web Scraping | Automatización de extracción de datos públicos
 Computer Vision | Identificación automática de especies
 Sustentabilidad | Monitoreo de stocks y análisis de impacto ambiental

 STACK TECNOLÓGICO

Python • Jupyter • Pandas • Plotly • Streamlit • Scikit-learn • TensorFlow • BeautifulSoup • APIs (datos.gob.ar, Global Fishing Watch)

 ÚNETE A LA COMUNIDAD

Ya sea que seas ingeniero pesquero interesado en aprender programación, científico de datos curioso sobre el sector pesquero, o profesional buscando aplicar IA en tu trabajo, este es tu espacio!

 Visita nuestro GitHub: github.com/pesqueros-ia
 Accede a recursos gratuitos y proyectos open-source
 Participa en discusiones y comparte tus ideas

Sejak didirikan pada Juli 2007, LKI sudah memberikan solusi pelatihan komputer kepada anak - anak di  sekolah di Indonesia. Pelayanan ke sekolah dimulai dari Pulau Samosir [Pangururan, Palipi dan OnanRunggu] dan pelayanan terus berkembang ke daerah lain seperti Sekolah di Kabanjahe, Deli Serdang, Binjai, Medan, Banda Aceh, Aceh Tenggara hingga Palembang. 

LKI juga bekerjasama dengan Pemerintah Indonesia sejak tahun 2021 melalui Program Kartu Prakerja dengan menyediakan pelatihan komputer yang mendukung peningkatan keterampilan angkatan tenaga kerja di seluruh Indonesia.

Name: GENIUS MAX | CURSOS ONLINE
Description:
Sobre Luís Maximiano

Sou Luís Maximiano, um Engenheiro Informático e membro efetivo da Ordem dos Engenheiros. Ao longo dos anos, dediquei minha carreira ao ensino e à formação na área de Tecnologias de Informação e Comunicação. Com mais de 50.000 horas de ensino ministradas a milhares de alunos, adquiri uma profunda paixão por capacitar as pessoas através do conhecimento.

 A Minha Jornada como Formador
Desde 1993, atuei como formador em diversas instituições de ensino, tanto públicas quanto privadas. O meu compromisso em partilhar conhecimento levou-me a ministrar centenas de cursos abrangendo uma variedade de tópicos, desde Excel e Word até Blender 3D e Algoritmia, entre outros. No entanto, é o Excel que ocupa um lugar especial no meu coração, pois acredito que é uma ferramenta poderosa que pode melhorar significativamente a vida financeira das pessoas, oferecendo oportunidades de emprego mais lucrativas por meio do aumento da produtividade.

 Desmistificando o Excel
Muitas pessoas têm medo do Excel devido à sua aparente complexidade matemática. No entanto, quero esclarecer que o Excel é uma ferramenta que realiza os cálculos, enquanto nós apenas preparamos as folhas de cálculo. A minha missão é mostrar a todos que o Excel é acessível a qualquer pessoa, independentemente do seu conhecimento prévio. Com determinação, todos podem dominar essa poderosa ferramenta.

 A Nossa Comunidade de Excel
O meu objetivo é construir a maior comunidade de entusiastas do Excel em Portugal. Conto com cada um de vós para se juntarem a mim nesta missão. Juntos, vamos desvendar o potencial do Excel e alcançar novos patamares de sucesso e eficiência.

 Saiba Mais
Trabalho com folhas de cálculo (planilhas) desde 1992. Iniciei minha jornada com o Lotus 123 no MS-DOS e, em 1993, fiz a transição para o Excel na versão 2.0.

Computers come in many forms, from the massive servers powering the internet to the small devices in our pockets (smartphones). At their core, all computers perform the same basic functions: input, processing, output, and storage.

Name: EastHome(HK) Consulting Limited
Description:
Easthome was founded in 1998 at Peking University's Yan Yuan, making it one of China's earliest advanced IT training providers. Headquartered in Beijing, it has direct branches in Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Tianjin, Wuhan, Chengdu, Chongqing, Jinan, Xi'an, Shijiazhuang, Hangzhou, Changsha, Zhengzhou, and Hong Kong. With authorizations from over 30 internationally renowned vendors—including Huawei, Red Hat, Microsoft, PMI, VMware by Boardcom and  Oracle — Easthome offers three learning delivery methods: in-person classes, live online sessions, and recorded courses. The company employs more than 40 full-time instructors and technical experts, along with thousands of contracted trainers, establishing itself as a well-known pan-IT education and training group in China.

For over 20 years, Easthome has continuously updated and expanded its IT professional training programs, building a continues curriculum system for pre-career students, individual learners, and corporate clients. With over 200 up-to-date courses covering specialized fields such as virtualization, operating systems, networking, cybersecurity, databases, IT management, and software development, the company hosts thousands of in-person and live training sessions annually, training nearly 20,000 professionals each year.

Today, after more than two decades of dedicated growth, Easthome has become a leading pan-IT training service provider in China, achieving annual revenues exceeding 100 million yuan.

Looking ahead, Easthome remains committed to delivering top-tier lifelong learning services to individuals and enterprises, cultivating digital talent for industrial advancement, and meeting the lifelong educational needs of society through high-quality training.

Name: IT SCHOOL
Description:
IT School (école Algora) est une association qui dispense des ateliers de robotique et informatique, et qui a pour but de former les jeunes et les adultes.
Elle a pour vocation première d’apprendre aux enfants les enjeux du numérique afin de mieux comprendre le monde qui les entoure aujourd’hui. Activités destinées aux enfants de 6 à 18 ans.

La découverte de la programmation à l’école primaire débute dès le cycle 2, à partir du CP, et se poursuit jusqu’au Lycée (Python). 
Au départ, à l'école, elle consiste essentiellement à programmer les déplacements d’un robot et à animer un personnage sur un écran :

- Dès le CE1, les élèves peuvent coder des déplacements à l’aide d’un logiciel de programmation adapté, ce qui les amènera au CE2 à la compréhension, et à la production d’algorithmes simples.

- Une initiation à la programmation est faite à l’occasion notamment d’activités de repérage ou de déplacement (programmer les déplacements d’un robot ou ceux d’un personnage sur un écran), ou d’activités géométriques (construction de figures simples ou de figures composées de figures simples)

Des manuels sont fournis par la société pour initier pas-à-pas les écoliers à la programmation de robots

Les élèves apprennent à programmer avec des icônes dans un environnement de programmation adapté à leur âge et idéal pour aborder simplement la logique de la programmation.

Comme la robotique est une discipline alliée de la programmation dans l’élaboration de la plupart des objets de la vie quotidienne, une initiation à la robotique est également proposée. Cette discipline nous a, en effet, semblé indispensable pour que les élèves aient une idée concrète des domaines d’application de la programmation. Les 3 manuels de programmation sont donc complétés par 3 manuels dédiés à la robotique pour découvrir 3 mécanismes de base : les roues, les engrenages et les arbres à cames.

Nous disposons donc de tout un cursus dédié aux enfants de la primaire jusq'au Lycée.

Name: SHARE Connected Community
Description: SHARE is the name of this new digital concept reserved for students from major international hotel management schools who will be the managers and directors of tomorrow. A knowledge sharing network between students from the highest hospitality institutions around the world, where they will have the opportunity to glean information related to their academic curriculum, to exchange and collaborate within a single and same and platform. We will be the pioneers of this market which until now does not offer any offer similar to ours. Our concept, an educational social network where students and teachers will be able to exchange and share information and articles of an academic or professional nature within the community. One access will be reserved for professors/ administration and the second for students/alumni. A first news feed will be dedicated to the school's internal network in order to be able to request only the school's network for specific searches. Teachers will be able to post articles or exercises only on this news feed and will only be visible through the internal network. The second news feed will bring together all the schools that are part of the community SHARE. Students will then be able to solicit the entire community to carry out all kinds of research related to their academic or professional careers, such as finding an internship, housing, jobs and much more.

Name: CADIndia
Description:
CADIndia is an organization designed to teach underprivileged members of our society different jewellery CAD softwares. We will be teaching them 2 softwares that are widely used in the industry - Rhino and Matrix. 
It’s a 4 month course (3 days/week for 3 hours/day). It’ll be taught in our office at Lower Parel, Mumbai (in-person) itself. Our teachers are vastly experienced having been teaching jewellery CAD for over 20 years now. 
CAD courses usually cost somewhere between 40-50,000 rupees but since this organization is run under our family trust we are only charging students 8,000 rupees. There is no age limit or gender restriction, but the students should have a little basic computer knowledge prior to enrolling. It is a highly skilled job so an approximate starting salary will be between 10,000 and 12,000 rupees per month with expected big increments every year. We will also be helping students with job placements post graduation too, since we have relationships with all the top jewellery companies across India.

Simplifying the daily lives of senior citizens when it comes to new technologies. Computers, touch-screen tablets and cell phones are an integral part of modern life, but they can often seem complex and intimidating to use. Our support staff are specially trained to help you overcome these obstacles, providing step-by-step explanations with complete peace of mind.

Patient, courteous, polite and always ready to listen, they are committed to making technology more accessible and less frightening. We believe that everyone has the capacity to use these tools, provided they are accompanied in a caring and attentive way. We move at your pace, so that each step is clear and acquired before moving on to the next.

Because we know that technology is also a way of staying connected to others, in addition to helping you, our trainers also like to discuss, exchange and share moments of conviviality around your favorite subjects. Whether it's talking about your hobbies, current events or even your memories, each session is also an opportunity to create social links, while learning.

Our aim is to enable you to use your devices independently, without fear of making a “wrong move” or “deleting everything” by mistake. With us, you can make the most of your computer, tablet or phone to keep in touch with your children and grandchildren, discover new passions online, or simply have fun. When you call on our team, you're opting for tailored, human and caring assistance, so that technology becomes a true ally in your daily life.

Name: SDU-assistant
Description:
According to the Bureau of National Statistics of the Agency for Strategic Planning and Reforms of the Republic of Kazakhstan, the total number of students amounted to 576,557 people. Compared to the last academic year, the number of students decreased by 4.6% in the current academic year. In total, 152,789 people were admitted to universities. 115,186 people were expelled from universities for various reasons, 153,627 people graduated from universities. We see that almost 20% of all students in the country were expelled from universities for various reasons. Of these, 9.1% were expelled due to academic failure.
As students, we see the problem in the fact that it is difficult for students to contact teachers, since teachers often do not have time for students. For example, in SDU, the system is such that many students have different schedules, and as we know, SDU teachers can devote only one hour a week to “office hours”. According to our survey, 54.2% of students face problems with their studies in the first year, and 29.2% of the students we interviewed did not manage to meet with a teacher for “office hours”. Also in our survey, to the question “how often have you asked for help from other students”, more than 54\% of students answered that they seek help from other students on a regular basis. 
Also in our survey, we found out whether senior students face problems with internships at the university, as it turned out, many undergraduates have all sorts of problems with this.
Thanks to these statistics, we see the problem of our students and we want to contribute to the education of our country, and to minimize the number of students expelled due to academic failure. To do this, my team and I have developed a website where students who are strong in certain subjects could help other students with lessons.

Name: Get Software Savvy
Description:
Tech doesn’t have to be overwhelming. I’m Nicola Reynolds—a specialist in software, systems, and digital confidence for small business owners. I help entrepreneurs get past the jargon and complexity so they can automate, organize, and grow with the right tech, minus the headaches.

But my journey is about more than business. Diagnosed as autistic at 37, I know what it feels like to be misunderstood and out of place. I’m a survivor of emotional abuse and mental health battles. Rebuilding my life taught me how to trust myself, honour my energy, and set strong boundaries that nurture my peace.

That resilience flows into everything I do. With every client, I bring lived experience and technical expertise. You get more than solutions—you get structure, practical support, and calm in the chaos, all offered without judgement.

I’m a proud mum, published author, lifelong learner, and dancer at heart. I’m passionate about neurodiversity and mental health and believe healing isn’t linear, but possible. You don’t have to change who you are to succeed—you just need the right support and a little encouragement.

WHAT I DO: I guide entrepreneurs through tech choices, streamline their workflows, and tailor software for their real-world needs—step by step, together.

WHY I DO IT: I believe everyone deserves simple, effective solutions—especially if tech isn’t your first language. There’s always a way that works for you.

HOW I HELP: Through consults, supportive training at your pace, and clear guides in your best learning style. You’ll always know what’s next, and why it matters.

WHY IT WORKS: My approach is proven—over years as a trainer, I’ve helped even the most ‘tech-phobic’ clients master web design, automation, and client management.

Web Hosting & Design

Name: Net Architect
Description:
Net Architect is the definitive simulation platform dedicated to transforming networking theory into practical design expertise. We believe true mastery of infrastructure planning, from IP addressing to redundancy, comes through hands-on challenge, not just memorization.

Our interactive environment simulates complex, real-world scenarios, forcing users to make critical design decisions across essential domains:

Advanced IP & VLSM: Practice complex subnetting, route summarization, and IPv6 assignments for massive host requirements.

Topology & Redundancy: Design high-availability networks by implementing FHRP (HSRP/VRRP), planning VLAN trunking, and simulating Layer 2 protocols.

Security & Optimization: Implement Access Control Lists (ACLs) based on specific policy constraints and design efficient routing areas.

Built by students for students, Net Architect is the essential training ground for certification exam prep, interview readiness, and career acceleration. Stop reviewing slides and start designing. Join us to build the skills that define modern enterprise and cloud infrastructure.

Officiellement, LaB@se a été créé en 2024 après plusieurs diagnostiques : les entreprises et les particuliers ont souvent affaire à des employés ou des systèmes informatiques sans avoir préalablement été formé sur les bases.

Ainsi, LaB@se offre une gamme de formations, alliant sujets plus généraux (formations au langage de programmation Python) et sujets spécifiques (Intelligence Artificielle et Internet des Objets).

LaB@se se démarque des organismes de formation traditionnels en utilisant une méthode didactique qui combine le logiciel (programmation) et le matériel (visualisation et manipulation du réél). L’utilisation de matériel avancé (drone, voiture, microcontrolleurs, capteurs) pour voir le résultat d’un programme permet d’appréhender des concepts logiques beaucoup plus rapidement et durablement.
